name: David Hogg
subject: Asking one more time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We can do this if we stick together.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260131-2&t=1&akid=3106%2E587540%2EaAu2qw)
**It’s a big night, Peter.**
It’s Election Day in Houston, where we have the chance to elect Christian Menefee, who would be our first elected congressional candidate of 2026.
It’s also the end of the month, which means we’ve got a deadline tonight. We’re about to close the books on January fundraising ahead of the midnight cutoff.
We need your help to make sure we’re celebrating two big wins tonight. We need to elect Christian Menefee and reach our **$25,000** end-of-month fundraising goal.
**[Will you contribute $5 or anything you can to make these wins happen?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260131_2_finalask.ekNP3F&refcode=em20260131-3106&amount=5&t=2&akid=3106%2E587540%2EaAu2qw)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260131_2_finalask.ekNP3F&amount=5&refcode=em20260131-3106&t=21&akid=3106%2E587540%2EaAu2qw)**
We’ve got some pretty big plans this year — and a long list of young progressive candidates we’re ready to elect. Honestly, that’s the only way out of the hellscape that Donald Trump, MAGA Republicans, and an out of touch Congress have wrought.
We have an opportunity to set the tone for the rest of the year TONIGHT and prove that we are ready to deliver the change this country needs to see.
[**If you’re with us, rush a $5 donation before the midnight deadline.**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3961?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260131_2_finalask.bGWfNb&refcode=em20260131-3106&amount=5&t=22&akid=3106%2E587540%2EaAu2qw)
We can do this if we stick together, Peter.
Thank you,
David Hogg

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260131-2&t=23&refcode2=3106_587540_aAu2qw&akid=3106%2E587540%2EaAu2qw)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=3106%2E587540%2EaAu2qw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3106%2E587540%2EaAu2qw)

To give by check:

subject: goodbye forever MSNBC...
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo) **BREAKING from _Deadline:_
[_“MSNBC_ Makes The Shift To _MS NOW_ As Part Of Split From _Comcast_ ”](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=3&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=4&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo) [**Please confirm: Do you still watch _MSNBC_ after becoming _MS NOW?_ >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=5&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=6&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=7&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=8&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo)
---
_** Please, your response is critical. We need to ensure that Democrats across the country are still tuning into_ MS NOW! **_
We’re still in SHOCK team... this news comes after multiple other networks have bent the knee to Trump and his MAGA allies this past year!

**REMEMBER:** _CBS_ caved and fired Stephen Colbert for being outspoken about the Trump administration.

**REMEMBER:** _ABC_ sidelined Jimmy Kimmel for making comments that MAGA disagreed with.

**AND REMEMBER:** _NBC_ is now scrubbing _MSNBC_ from its brand – despite _MSNBC_ being a critical network millions trust to hold Republicans accountable.

We can’t afford to lose one of the few remaining progressive voices on national television, but we’re nervous that Democrats like you, team, are going to tune out after this shakeup.
[**So we’re launching a rapid response poll to [50] of our most informed Democrats in your area to gauge their support for _MS NOW._ _Please respond before 11:59 PM to validate our data >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=9&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo)
[**Please confirm: Do you still watch _MSNBC_ after becoming _MS NOW?_ >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=10&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72902?t=11&akid=23880%2E4449941%2E3tGkZo)

Thank you,

Fight For Reform

REMEMBER: CBS caved and fired Stephen Colbert for being outspoken about the Trump administration. REMEMBER: ABC sidelined Jimmy Kimmel for making comments that MAGA disagreed with. AND REMEMBER: NBC is now scrubbing MSNBC from its brand – despite MSNBC being a critical network millions trust to hold Republicans accountable. We can’t afford to lose one of the few remaining progressive voices on national television, but we’re nervous that Democrats like you, team, are going to tune out after this shakeup. [So we’re launching a rapid response poll to [50] of our most informed Democrats in your area to gauge their support for MS NOW. Please respond before 11:59 PM to validate our data >>]() | | | Thank you, Fight For Reform MS NOW is not associated or affiliated with Fight For Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this. | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-federal will be used in End Citizens United Non-federal’s sole discretion and are not being earmarked for use in any particular state or election.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Before bed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, it’s the last night of January and just hours from my first FEC reporting deadline of 2026.
I’m the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024. And MAGA is lining up millions to flip this seat and drown out the truth with disinformation.
That’s the fight ahead. And I need you by my side.
Before you turn in: [**Can you rush $5 before midnight to help me win in Georgia?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260131-2-f&t=1&akid=1550%2E5691347%2EZ-zyIs)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260131-2-f&t=2&akid=1550%2E5691347%2EZ-zyIs)**
When I first ran for Senate five years ago, it was because I believed the election of someone so deeply unfit for the presidency posed a danger to the country.
Many people said it couldn’t be done. But you believed — not just in me, but in the idea that Georgia could lead, and that our Republic is worth defending.
Then we won. Not just a Senate seat, but the Senate majority for Democrats.
Now Trump has launched a power grab unprecedented in our history, abusing his power and trying to poison our Republic with fear and intimidation.
Americans are now living in fear of their own government.
I’m fighting back.
And I need you with me.
Please, if you can make it work, donate what you can before my midnight deadline.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260131-2-f&t=3&akid=1550%2E5691347%2EZ-zyIs)**
As always,
Jon Ossoff

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The quickest of notes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
My team and I have reached out a bit more than usual over the last few days, and I hope we haven’t gotten on your nerves.
#

Hey - Mark Kelly here.
I just wanted to send a quick personal note. My team and I have reached out a bit more than usual over the last few days, and I hope we haven’t gotten on your nerves.
The truth is that messages like this are the largest source of donations our campaign has. Period.
If I could fight back against Trump without them, I’d do it in a heartbeat. But the reality here is that you are one of the most important parts of our operation.
I mean that.

MK

Here's the honest truth: By midnight tonight, we either surge forward -- or spend the next month scrambling to catch up. **I 'm not exaggerating -- that's just the math of special elections.** Tonight is our first end-of-month deadline of 2026, and we need to raise $24,000 to fund the turnout effort that will decide this race on March 10. **_Once this window closes, we don 't get it back._** There's no do-over for missed organizing. No makeup day for voters we didn't reach. Momentum isn't something we can borrow later -- we have to build it when the opportunity is in front of us. This campaign is about showing up early, doing the work, and proving that people-powered politics still wins. But that only happens if supporters step up when it counts most. name: Robert Garcia
subject: quick but urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
We have too much to do in 2026
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124470822/598721507/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Q3YzljOS0wMmZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTMqMdwHlhaFo1lijl49YZ4A79_8gsGQXBIDqSiufpc=)
In just a few hours, our January end-of-month deadline hits — the very first fundraising deadline of 2026 — and the truth is simple: what we do right now sets the tone for everything that comes next.
**[Will you rush a donation immediately to help me hit my $10,000 grassroots fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124470823/598721508/-309737922?refcode=260131_RG_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Q3YzljOS0wMmZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTMqMdwHlhaFo1lijl49YZ4A79_8gsGQXBIDqSiufpc=)**
[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124470824/598721509/-309737922?refcode=260131_RG_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Q3YzljOS0wMmZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTMqMdwHlhaFo1lijl49YZ4A79_8gsGQXBIDqSiufpc=)
We don’t get to pause before demanding the Epstein files be released and investigated.
We don’t get to wait before holding Kristi Noem accountable.
We don’t get to delay when ICE is violating human rights in plain sight.
And we don’t get to sleepwalk into November if we want to win back the House.
This work doesn’t start someday. It starts tonight.
**Hitting this goal means we begin 2026 on offense — organizing early, pushing hard, and showing that Democrats are ready to govern with urgency instead of excuses. Missing it sends the opposite message at the exact moment we can’t afford one.**
**[If you’ve been meaning to give, this is it. If you’ve already given once, I’m asking you to step up again. A contribution in these final hours helps power the investigations, the accountability, and the electoral wins we need this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124470825/598721510/-309737922?refcode=260131_RG_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2Q3YzljOS0wMmZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sTMqMdwHlhaFo1lijl49YZ4A79_8gsGQXBIDqSiufpc=)**
What happens next depends on what we do now.
In solidarity,
Robert Garcia

subject: This is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m counting on your support.
#
**Hi, it's Sarah. I wanted to reach out with one last reminder about our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.**
Right now, we're just $2,000 short of our $40,000 goal.
This campaign has always been about showing what's possible when everyday people step up for their neighbors. **That's how we've gotten this far, and it's how we'll finish strong.**
**[Can you donate $50, $25, $10, or even $1 before midnight? It's our first major deadline of 2026, and I'm hoping I can count on your support to close the gap.](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260131-2.oIJjKW&refcode=em20260131-2760&t=1&akid=2760%2E21716%2E8Ce4t5)**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I’ll get right to it

Hi Derek, it’s Josh — and I’ll get right to it:

Tonight is our first End-of-Month deadline since I officially announced my reelection campaign for Governor of Pennsylvania.

**Really, it’s our first chance to show everyone what our campaign is made of.**

I just touched base with my Finance Team, and they told me we’re just a few thousand dollars away from hitting our goal. In other words, if everyone reading this message chipped in $5, we’d reach our goal in seconds.

**[So I’m humbly asking: Can you chip in anything you can before midnight to put our campaign over the top? Every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124470973/598725724/1156619579?refcode=email_013126_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjA1NGNlMC0wM2ZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_FUoe3IPAcKI-_yAU0Xu8iB4M12SEkeh5ls1_CPnEMk=)**

name: Moulton HQ
subject: This crossed a line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Weaponizing prosecutors isn’t normal.

| |
---
Friend, Earlier this month, federal prosecutors opened investigations into Minnesota Governor Tim Walz and Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey. Using the justice system to target elected officials is un-American. This is the kind of tactic we see in authoritarian governments, not in a democracy governed by the rule of law. Seth introduced the FAIR Justice Act earlier this month to draw clear limits and stop this kind of abuse. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124470976/598726690/2090747700?refcode=260131_sm_eom2_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiZmIwNC0wNGZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LIOSc2ugVSXhpr8NCgeTL7nyVeb-y7l_-qs20ttTXrY=) This bill sets clear safeguards so federal prosecutions can’t be used as political retaliation, and it protects the integrity of the justice system and the voters it serves. As we head into the final days of the month, pushing this legislation forward is urgent and critical. Congress needs to act, and our campaign is committed to putting continued pressure on this issue. Meeting our end-of-month goal helps keep this fight front and center and gives this campaign the capacity to keep pressing Congress to act. **[We need the resources to keep raising the alarm and pushing for action. Will you contribute before the end of the month?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124470977/598726691/2090747700?refcode=260131_sm_eom2_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiZmIwNC0wNGZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LIOSc2ugVSXhpr8NCgeTL7nyVeb-y7l_-qs20ttTXrY=)** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124470978/598726881/1375639745?refcode=260131_sm_eom2_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGZiZmIwNC0wNGZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LIOSc2ugVSXhpr8NCgeTL7nyVeb-y7l_-qs20ttTXrY=)

body:
| | Matt Maasdam is a husband, a father, and a Navy SEAL. He carried the nuclear football for President Obama — now he's running as a Democrat to flip Michigan's 7th congressional district. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy94BMEtGC6mHTmQqNdHOJWNbdJJrdzqEfpr1Cg3-BFcDAgssMiynuTPcIBRxFzq5HdoHDxZp8sIkRxw0WaBo_5kbKkxILa_mQUhQOR5PY5XWj4PFa-wv7KxYoilzAJqbRcpaNWwlsA1lvNhbW1OAuV8ksuyuu-yq4X30RSUYtPzFbVcsMy6WKZ4L6Nrobc0bsnmcu3QBHnMtjYJPWBP_hJ_9MSqFgiUrDCmObd5xBV4uR5q1GAy6n3H2hHU-KMukBDoLehSXbudWCRWDTks6zBgOcSnc2OOd-Bp40Mtr-6hbyPLWLVb7I-osEVqaoZm0M-/4ns/42uKXNt_RDyf06ITR581WQ/h0/h001.z63fAQrg9aMvkrpZr8PH9fm8QM0cpGOhfr_qoux3e1o)

Good evening. It's Matt Maasdam — one more email from me before our deadline hits in a few hours. Our campaign to flip MI-07 is coming up on our next big end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight. But forget about that for a moment. I want to tell you a little about why I decided to get in this race in the first place. My wife Laura and I keep this sign up on the back of our door at all times. It’s the last thing our kids see before they go out into the world every day. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv2VnP90fG31OLpl0iHJFp0w4SjhiIC7jO8v_vg14a85Kyg1JxA6OetfB35IgTMdoOCsbMwASH5l5Qb78fjf0lPrH5hvMf7XY73vLog_Ie-P30icIc5seKLK8decYisnri26vEN0J_H4syeapypJNIXR8jps_a00L-YIzNqJllAS4f_lMY8PYRtAHZQfHjrHH0GaIEYRPbxf1n2grvZJgNhlCNqnd3a_4QQ-xy5ZNtD4AwRluz8vFa_i5Yji678kUxX9WMndfQF-lt8S1bYkofpTLR56G3IuO-cVJqyG0Y9OQ/4ns/42uKXNt_RDyf06ITR581WQ/h2/h001.hNHCB0nILF4cXh0uEB_GY8ozkVleogjQ03uvJyDVX1Q) _Be kind. Leave it better than you found it. Work twice as hard as everyone else. Family first._ These are the values we’re trying to teach our kids. But those aren’t the values we’re seeing in Washington right now. The guy who’s currently in this seat is ripping away healthcare from Michigan families to fund a tax break for billionaires. My opponent, Congressman Tom Barrett, has taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from Betsy DeVos, Elon Musk, and Mike Johnson. He’s even in the pockets of the big pharma corporations. He isn’t working for mid-Michigan — he’s working for his campaign donors. That’s why I believe that we need normal people, not politicians, to step up and lead. It’s why I made the decision to run for Congress. And it’s why **I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money.** Flipping this district is going to be an uphill battle. But with supporters like you on my Team, I’m confident that we can do it. But first, we need to hit fundraising deadlines like the one that we’re facing in just a few hours. So please. **[I am respectfully asking you to donate $25 to my campaign’s fundraising deadline before midnight tonight. The only way we’re going to fire Tom Barrett is with your help. Thank you in advance for your generous support.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv2VnP90fG31OLpl0iHJFp0w4SjhiIC7jO8v_vg14a85Kyg1JxA6OetfB35IgTMdoOCsbMwASH5l5Qb78fjf0lPViJci8zlrAi5vp3hMd-ma5dMkcmO2BfyEeFyc3KoMqPThiYsEI4kvJgOef4scVoZDtUVPO28m7-lM1lDLPJ94jEsO5KXOVq06FIG2Uz2exVkuxisMmaDbKx3hB5NeSUbGg4xs2J8Ravo2f5flOKQHZeKIzMLMRURcW95mRm1FGu9JBm_ELNBx1xWeLk_0qHx5ZnvuPOcKQrUL9kxZWaaKA/4ns/42uKXNt_RDyf06ITR581WQ/h3/h001.r3oNOocj0iesXanCXacpy7c15eI_AmMgnq9-YQBP_XU)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: | | Matt Maasdam is a husband, a father, and a Navy SEAL. He carried the nuclear football for President Obama — now he's running as a Democrat to flip Michigan's 7th congressional district. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Good evening. It's Matt Maasdam — one more email from me before our deadline hits in a few hours. Our campaign to flip MI-07 is coming up on our next big end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight. But forget about that for a moment. I want to tell you a little about why I decided to get in this race in the first place. My wife Laura and I keep this sign up on the back of our door at all times. It’s the last thing our kids see before they go out into the world every day. Be kind. Leave it better than you found it. Work twice as hard as everyone else. Family first. These are the values we’re trying to teach our kids. But those aren’t the values we’re seeing in Washington right now. The guy who’s currently in this seat is ripping away healthcare from Michigan families to fund a tax break for billionaires. My opponent, Congressman Tom Barrett, has taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from Betsy DeVos, Elon Musk, and Mike Johnson. He’s even in the pockets of the big pharma corporations. He isn’t working for mid-Michigan — he’s working for his campaign donors. That’s why I believe that we need normal people, not politicians, to step up and lead. It’s why I made the decision to run for Congress. And it’s why I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money. Flipping this district is going to be an uphill battle. But with supporters like you on my Team, I’m confident that we can do it. But first, we need to hit fundraising deadlines like the one that we’re facing in just a few hours. So please. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | | | | | | Let’s go win this, Matt Maasdam 🇺🇸 * | PAID FOR BY MATT MAASDAM FOR CONGRESS MATT MAASDAM WAS A UNITED STATES NAVY SEAL. The elections are here |
#
---
Team, I was elected by my fellow Democratic governors to serve as Vice Chair of the Democratic Governors Association — and it’s a responsibility I take seriously. **Because governors have never mattered more than they do in this moment.** While Washington Republicans cater to megadonors and fuel chaos, **Democratic governors are on the front lines — protecting fundamental freedoms, lowering costs, and delivering real results for working families.** This year, thirty-six governors’ races will be decided. That’s thirty-six chances to stop far-right extremism at the state level.
Thirty-six opportunities to elect people who actually want to solve problems.
Thirty-six races that will shape the future of this country. Winning them takes early investment, strong organizing, and the resources to compete everywhere. When you join for just $35 , your membership fee goes directly to supporting patriots who are dedicated to furthering my father's America First agenda. ** **** If we lose our MAGA majority this year, my father's agenda - and his legacy - will be completely demolished. They might even remove him from office. Our country is hanging in the balance, and when you become a Sustaining Member, YOU become our first line of defense against the socialist Democrats. Plus, you 'll be working directly with me to KEEP MAKING AMERICA GREAT! **** I look forward to working together, Donald Trump Jr. Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Kim Schrier (personal)
subject: I don't take this support for granted. Never have, never will.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This campaign is YOURS.
Peter,

Before I ask you for anything, I want to say this first— _thank you.**Truly.**_

This campaign only exists because of people like you. And as we get closer to Election Day, every door we knock, every organizer we hire, every ad we run, and every conversation we'll have with voters will only be made possible because of your support.

I want you to know that I've never taken that for granted, not even for a second.

Peter, I ran for office to serve you and to fight for families, for healthcare, for commonsense and decency in government. I didn't sign up for this because I enjoy asking for money—**in fact, it's my least favorite part of this job.** But I also know this: none of the work we do is possible without a campaign that's strong, prepared, and ready for what's ahead. And right now, we're facing our very first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2026.

With November’s election being the most consequential one we've faced, it's critical that we keep our campaign in fighting shape. Not just to defend this seat, but to help deliver a Democratic House that can stand up to this cruel, chaotic, corrupt, and out-of-control administration, and actually deliver meaningfully for the people we serve. I am so proud of what we've built together, and I'm deeply grateful every single day for the trust you've placed in me as your representative.

This isn't my campaign, it's YOURS. And if you're able, I'm asking you to chip in $5 before our deadline hits at midnight tonight to help us fight for WA-08 and a blue House: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-q1-em-2026 &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124471223/598735623/1210615431?refcode=em26_260131_eom3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260131_eom3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=96736266-06ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjczNjI2Ni0wNmZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxjcWO-3vtd9u9v8j0fsMte6hb31ZsB2TUYGfM16g2o=)

With gratitude,

Kim

name: Cori Bush
subject: I’m not taking a single dollar of their dirty money.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act]
Peter,
I need you with me. Can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can before my first end-of-month deadline of 2026 tonight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act&amount=10] Every dollar helps us organize, knock on doors, make calls, and build the people-powered movement we need to win in Missouri’s First District.
Let me tell you something. Big money is already all over my opponent’s campaign, and they’re counting on drowning us out. But we’ve built something they couldn’t possibly dream of buying—a movement that shows up month after month, brick by brick .
And right now, our neighbors are crying out for help. Our communities are hurting, with no way out. Our president is breaking laws left and right, enabled by the inaction of his allies, such as my opponent.
Right now, too many are stuck in a safe political box—afraid to ruffle feathers and afraid to stray from the status quo. That kind of politics fails our communities. It’s time to break that box. Democrats need to be leaders with the courage and vision to imagine what’s next, and then do the work to deliver real results.
In Congress, you can count on me to deliver results on the issues that matter most to all of us: the safety of our communities, the money in our pockets, and our ability to survive and thrive.
And yes— I’m not taking a single dollar of their dirty money.
We’ve got just over six months to build the movement that will win, and hitting this end-of-month goal is how it starts. Chip in now and show what people power really looks like. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act]
DONATE BEFORE MIDNIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act]
— Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=x_260131_breakthebox_eom2_act&recurring=1]
Paid for by Cori For Us
Cori For Us
PO Box 12404
St. Louis, MO 63132
United States

Peter, Sorry to bother you with an email on your Saturday evening, I promise to make this quick. Our end-of-month deadline is just a few hours away — at midnight tonight. We still need more grassroots support to keep our campaign strong and maintain momentum. So I’ll get straight to it, Peter: can you chip in $5, or whatever you can spare, before the clock runs out? Here’s a link if you’re able to give today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vf-em-fr-jan26](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124471316/598739680/-2051124973?amount=5&source=VF_EM_FR_013126_B1_EOM06&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTRmNjU5Ni0wN2ZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJZeX9_2PPHCARRHSKO5cWDtUnKiJNFD5QJu_ySK1ag=) **With our primary coming up in just a few weeks, my team and I are hitting the ground running** — connecting with voters, sharing our mission, and making sure NC-04 constituents have a strong voice in Congress. Defending this seat takes resources, and your support right now means everything. Could you take a moment to donate any amount to my re-election campaign? name: Laura Friedman (personal)
subject: sending an unmistakable message
body:
Friend,
I know you’ve heard from me and my team quite a bit over the past few days. That’s because midnight tonight marks an important fundraising deadline; the first of our election year — our chance to add a significant check to this administration.
My first year in Congress shows what Democrats can get done even in the minority when we organize with discipline and purpose: cutting housing red tape, making commutes safer, and delivering real progress for our communities. But imagine what we can do with the majority. That’s how we truly put the squeeze on Trump and force real accountability.
Because of your activism, the Trump administration is on the defensive. We’ve already seen Trump retreat and remove Greg Bovino, his top ICE enforcement official, after sustained public pressure — clear proof that pushing back against ICE’s deadly enforcement tactics works.
Now’s our chance to keep the momentum up. Every dollar we raise means more resources for my re-election and supporting our Red-to-Blue candidates. Your contribution also sends a clear message that we are united, determined to drive progressive change in Washington, and strong enough to take on the well-funded forces attacking our democracy. That’s why your support matters so much to me.
So friend, I would sincerely appreciate it if you would add a donation of $3 or more before tonight's deadline. Together, we'll show we're ready for seismic change this November.
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q1-2026](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124471332/598740492/-2092947258?refcode=em-1.31.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjZhNTcxY2YtMDdmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mz6lA28iAWKt51xmjQRbwddnJjTyx-X5QG6FgY5Cdqk=)**
Thank you,
Laura

Laura Friedman for Congress
PO Box 27296
Los Angeles, CA 90027
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/C_LAPt2gvkyS7ttbOCAOdg2?unsubscribedata=Rukah2jB9ipxMQgO2SzRZ1siEOsYWWxXnjYf%2Boy2TQjR7prczVOkHeofBxY%2BFuf0fz6Guv7qgnjiaU2OAJAafaKpwAG8V6HUfyDhE%2FGKl6uJxt6xcohSRpNWbvYTLmhH3jBJVUmrncKdjTZ1Ktbdvj0i30S1WSyjP9BCDEeh4m6Lq1snRA6sr9uiD%2F7tq9t%2BmcxPGDeRtkzb73Vkx0YYwpeValuSSj5wYoO2d7XXHRlthaw9QlbUKQ0Vd5yOx%2FdJdtyWLmq1VNz3ZxQHOz2hu0hom6son4Ue7AmTU1KuxX6Bcf0cqYNfYzNhWwvN%2BFTWN%2FVc%2BKuYYUaTw%2BSK9LDtXh550RjHBdNy%2BSF2QfqO7I4HcH%2FMBwWI%2BlSX6KRqvfwE0N17ueR2zPab0xM1WYH06Xk6Tzg76NyyaeOVJR41wVz80Pe8ZosQwXqnrGYRkF2Z).

name: Mel Tull
subject: this could change everything...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MEL TULL FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/119007/images/Screen%20Shot%202026-01-23%20at%2012.29.07%20PM.png]
Team, my MAGA opponent, Rob Wittman, has tripled his net worth since he got to Congress.
Let that sink in.
While you were struggling with rising costs. While families in our district were choosing between groceries and medicine. While working people were falling further behind – Rob Wittman was getting rich in Washington.
I'm a veteran. I took an oath to serve my country and put others before myself. Rob Wittman took that same oath. But somewhere along the way, he decided his bank account mattered more than your family's future.
That's not just wrong. That's a betrayal of everything we're supposed to stand for.
But here's what gives me inspiration: This race is WINNABLE. This district is FLIPPABLE.
Cook Political Report rates VA-01 as just R+3. Governor Abigail Spanberger WON this district in 2025. Trump is unpopular, costs are crushing families, and voters are fed up with MAGA politicians who only care about enriching themselves and their wealthy buddies.
We can win this. But only if we fight like hell.
I'm Mel Tull. I'm not a career politician looking to cash in. I'm a dad, a veteran, and a business lawyer who's sick of watching people like Rob Wittman line their pockets while our neighbors suffer. I put myself through college working multiple jobs and using the Army College Fund. I know what it means to struggle. I know what it means to serve.
And I know we deserve better than a congressman who's spent years voting to cut food assistance for struggling families, strip healthcare from the sick, and explode the debt our kids will inherit – all while padding his own wallet.
This is our shot. Right now. This moment.
We can flip this seat. We can send Rob Wittman packing. We can show every corrupt career politician in Washington that veterans who actually honor their oath can beat self-serving MAGA sellouts.
But I need you with me. Today.
Chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now. Every single dollar gets us closer to ending Rob Wittman's corrupt career and winning this fight for Virginia's working families. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
DONATE TODAY TO FLIP THIS SEAT AND TAKE BACK THE HOUSE! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
I took an oath to put service before self. Rob Wittman forgot what that means the minute he saw a chance to get rich.
Let's remind him.
Mel Tull
Candidate for Congress, VA-01
U.S. Army Veteran
P.S. – Rob Wittman TRIPLED his net worth while families in our district fell behind. That's not leadership. That's corruption. If you're as angry as I am, chip in $10, $25, or $50 right now and let's end his career this November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
HELP ME FLIP VA-01! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
PAID FOR BY MEL TULL FOR CONGRESS
Mell Tull for Congress
PO Box 56
Midlothian, VA 23114
United States

name: Chaz Molder
subject: (no subject)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
Peter,

I wanted to send a note before the month wraps up.

When I decided to run for Congress, I did it because I’ve seen firsthand what this job should look like. As mayor, I spend my days taking calls from people who don’t agree with each other and trying to solve problems that don’t come with talking points or TV cameras. It’s not glamorous work, but it matters.

That’s not what I see coming out of Washington right now.

Too often, our Representative is focused on generating attention instead of results. I think Middle Tennessee deserves someone who’s more interested in listening than performing, and more focused on doing the work than picking fights.

That’s why I’m running.

We’re now in the final hours of our first end-of-month deadline of the year, and we’re 67 donors away from our goal of 500 new grassroots supporters. Hitting that mark matters because it gives this campaign the resources to keep showing up everywhere in the district and to seriously compete in the months ahead.

If you’re able, I’d really appreciate your help before midnight tonight. Even a small contribution helps us close out this first month of the year strong and keeps this campaign moving forward.

https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-YgvAQemF6MZw7JGdEYs-w~~/AAUS1hA~/s4KijURMR_NutHAhQUH8BL_Wq1ddfvtldktG5SmSiPazRblgYddPYr2t-YWl5mTyQFYJ-slL3k9ZmidQs4bcuBkcgNpUXnmupyA7vvSHw2zIO4MGkWffFfeDGnLSbqOZrwhREs96stwwnBEo1hEkwA~~ [ https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/DzRzQo9Hr9HUEQytludcuA~~/AAUS1hA~/bCdaNCaVe5Is5jIGNo-yL_6AFbhjz5T2v99v32HhMCKeW3Kn7ut79HzJQ1Wibgk9h7x7p0IHJc4NMXjU80nCiW6-4UBFAACgUy-aQkS1o3RZ0ozrXBhtsBLaKLxjjN1VHFceDNhsGecxpGt5aTtV6dswledqblRCAib4OwRv-5TS1w96uc1tjdjK3wBFpgAt ]

Thanks for taking the time to read this, and for being part of what we’re building.

— Chaz

ABOUT CHAZ MOLDER

Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. As mayor, he founded the Columbia Mayor’s Youth Council to promote civic engagement among young people and emphasizes the importance of being present and responsive to the community.

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: My honest thoughts in the last few hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JASMINE FOR TEXAS Jasmine for Texas
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124471932/598749683/-1529437191?refcode=260131_E2A8_JC_EOM5&refcode2=f6eafe58-09ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&contactdata=7NQNju59dHZQVEvkcauytmB593lymg0DycTvslskFllw4IssTDgTQ7Swnx5lgG4k&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmVhZmU1OC0wOWZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8vFxQQ8gleXKs3HVjc9DARkUjWsVezrCPFXIQ0CJcg=) | | Y’all, I’m reaching out one last time tonight because we’re down to just a few hours before our end-of-month deadline — and this moment deserves honesty. I didn’t get into this race because it was easy. I didn’t get into it because it fit anyone’s idea of what was “safe”. **I got into it because I truly believe Texas cannot afford more of the same — not when people’s rights, dignity, and lives are on the line.** This campaign is about showing up when it counts, refusing to look away and choosing to believe that courage still matters in politics. _**Tonight, we have a chance to show that belief is real.**_ Before midnight, I’m asking everyone who can to step up and help me close this deadline strong. Organizing, mobilizing voters, and fighting back in this moment takes real resources — and real commitment, so we can’t afford to fall short of our $50,000 goal. [**If you’ve been thinking about giving, or meaning to give, I’m asking you to do it now. clean_body: = | | Y’all, I’m reaching out one last time tonight because we’re down to just a few hours before our end-of-month deadline — and this moment deserves honesty. I didn’t get into this race because it was easy. I didn’t get into it because it fit anyone’s idea of what was “safe”. I got into it because I truly believe Texas cannot afford more of the same — not when people’s rights, dignity, and lives are on the line. This campaign is about showing up when it counts, refusing to look away and choosing to believe that courage still matters in politics. Tonight, we have a chance to show that belief is real. Before midnight, I’m asking everyone who can to step up and help me close this deadline strong. subject: The most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history

body:
The stakes couldn't be clearer. At a time of extraordinary attacks on our fundamental right to vote, we have to unite and fight to stop opponents of voting rights in Congress from checking these suppression bills off their to-do list.
RUSH $35 or more right now to block the MEGA Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=013126_4&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: House Republicans propose stricter voting requirements as Trump administration eyes the midterms [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=013126_4&amount=25]
Folks, we've been warning you about the SAVE Act since it was introduced, since it's a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote.
Well, there's a new champion in the " anti-voting legislation " category with the introduction of the Make Elections Great Again (MEGA) Act. The new bill goes far beyond even the SAVE Act, with the MEGA Act now being called " the most extreme voting restrictions ever proposed at the federal level ."
The name also tells you everything you need to know about the target audience for this bill. With Trump focused on re-litigating the 2020 election, this legislation would give him all the power he would need to take federal control of the upcoming midterms .
PITCH IN $35 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE & MEGA ACTS NOW ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=013126_4&amount=35]
While the SAVE Act focused almost exclusively on requiring voters to produce documentary proof of citizenship when registering, the MEGA Act is far more sweeping. It would:
* Impose a strict photo ID requirement to vote
* Create a centralized voter surveillance system in every state
* Mandate constant voter roll purges, gutting the “Motor Voter” law that expanded access to voter registration
* Bar states from counting ballots that arrive after Election Day
* Ban universal mail voting, in which states mail a ballot to all registered voters
* Bar the federal funding for voter registration by outside groups
* Unleash lawsuits against election officials
Estimates said the SAVE Act could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. The MEGA Act would be much, much worse.
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop the MEGA Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=013126_4&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013126_4&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013126_4&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013126_4&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013126_4&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013126_4&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013126_4&amount=35]
The scariest parts of the MEGA Act are how it goes after so much more than proof-of-citizenship at registration. States aren't mandated to provide ID to eligible citizens, but the MEGA Act would require citizens to show the right kind of ID every time they went to vote. This creates inequality, like in Texas, where you can vote with a hunting license ( which doesn't require proof of citizenship ) but you can't vote with a college photo ID.
This bill targets voter registration as well, demanding that eligible voters re-prove their citizenship every election, while also requiring states to " take affirmative steps... on an ongoing basis " every 30 days to check and verify their voter rolls. How would they check them? Using a nationwide federal database controlled by MAGA partisans, of course . And the bill calls for all these measures to be in place before we vote in November's general election.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights said about the SAVE Act. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
His words ring even more true about the MEGA Act. This bill is nothing less than an all-out partisan assault on our fundamental right to vote . If made law, this bill would codify MAGA's power for decades to come, invalidating millions of eligible voters and ending our democracy for a generation or longer.
None of us can afford to sit on the sidelines, Team, and watch our fundamental right to vote die. Fight back against these cynical vote suppressors with $35 or whatever you can before it's too late >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=013126_4&amount=35]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=013126_4&amount=20]

clean_body: The stakes couldn't be clearer. At a time of extraordinary attacks on our fundamental right to vote, we have to unite and fight to stop opponents of voting rights in Congress from checking these suppression bills off their to-do list. RUSH $35 or more right now to block the MEGA Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [] Voter Action Project [] ABC: House Republicans propose stricter voting requirements as Trump administration eyes the midterms [] Folks, we've been warning you about the SAVE Act since it was introduced, since it's a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote. Well, there's a new champion in the " anti-voting legislation " category with the introduction of the Make Elections Great Again (MEGA) Act. The new bill goes far beyond even the SAVE Act, with the MEGA Act now being called " the most extreme voting restrictions ever proposed at the federal level ." The name also tells you everything you need to know about the target audience for this bill. With Trump focused on re-litigating the 2020 election, this legislation would give him all the power he would need to take federal control of the upcoming midterms . PITCH IN $35 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE & MEGA ACTS NOW ➜ [] While the SAVE Act focused almost exclusively on requiring voters to produce documentary proof of citizenship when registering, the MEGA Act is far more sweeping. It would: Impose a strict photo ID requirement to vote Create a centralized voter surveillance system in every state Mandate constant voter roll purges, gutting the “Motor Voter” law that expanded access to voter registration Bar states from counting ballots that arrive after Election Day Ban universal mail voting, in which states mail a ballot to all registered voters Bar the federal funding for voter registration by outside groups * Unleash lawsuits against election officials Estimates said the SAVE Act could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. The MEGA Act would be much, much worse. Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop the MEGA Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] The scariest parts of the MEGA Act are how it goes after so much more than proof-of-citizenship at registration. States aren't mandated to provide ID to eligible citizens, but the MEGA Act would require citizens to show the right kind of ID every time they went to vote. This creates inequality, like in Texas, where you can vote with a hunting license ( which doesn't require proof of citizenship ) but you can't vote with a college photo ID. This bill targets voter registration as well, demanding that eligible voters re-prove their citizenship every election, while also requiring states to " take affirmative steps... on an ongoing basis " every 30 days to check and verify their voter rolls. How would they check them? Using a nationwide federal database controlled by MAGA partisans, of course . And the bill calls for all these measures to be in place before we vote in November's general election. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights said about the SAVE Act. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” His words ring even more true about the MEGA Act. This bill is nothing less than an all-out partisan assault on our fundamental right to vote . If made law, this bill would codify MAGA's power for decades to come, invalidating millions of eligible voters and ending our democracy for a generation or longer. None of us can afford to sit on the sidelines, Team, and watch our fundamental right to vote die. Fight back against these cynical vote suppressors with $35 or whatever you can before it's too late >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. clean_body: George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Hey Peter, I’m sorry to bother you on a Saturday night — so I’ll keep this brief. Tonight marks our very first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the election year, and my team has set out to raise $15,000 to show the White House that we’re not backing down in our fight for results, not rhetoric, for the American people. Hitting this goal means sending a clear message of our strength and allows us to build up our resources to take back the House in November — and take back a critical check on Donald Trump’s power. It would mean the world to me if you could chip in just $ or really any amount before our deadline at midnight. Here’s a link for you: = [=] Thank you for your support, George Latimer [] [] [] For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: unsubscribe: You can also click here to donate [] .

name: John James
subject: Tonight: A turning point for Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Friend, **I'm going to be direct with you.** Our January Deadline is tonight at midnight, and we're not where we need to be. I spent eight years in the Army. I learned that you don't sugarcoat reality, you face it head-on and you fight through it. That's what I'm asking you to do with me right now. **We're behind. And the clock is running out.** Here's what this means: Every dollar we raise tonight determines how many voters we can reach tomorrow. It determines whether we can respond when we're attacked. It determines whether we have the resources to compete in every corner of this state. Michigan has been struggling. Our families are paying more for everything. Our businesses are being crushed by regulations. Our kids are falling behind in schools that should be world-class. **_We can fix this. But only if we have the resources to fight._** I'm not a career politician. I don't have party bosses writing me checks. I have people like you, Michiganders who are tired of watching our state decline.
---

* * *
### The BLUE Letter -- Saturday, January 31, 2026
Good evening, and welcome to **The BLUE Letter**.
Big news before we dive in: **Blue Amp Media is leveling up next week** with the launch of **three new shows** , expanding our original programming and deepening what we do best--fearless journalism, sharp conversation, and pro-democracy truth-telling. This growth is happening because of you, and we're just getting started.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9d9080ab-e8ef-419d-b783-34bb116516db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's what we're launching--and what [your subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/9d9080ab-e8ef-419d-b783-34bb116516db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) directly helps pay for:
* _**CounterStory Perspectives**_**with Melissa Corrigan** -- Mondays at 2pm ET
* _**Deep Dive**_**with Ellie Leonard** -- Fridays at 2pm ET, focused on history, justice, and moral clarity
* _**Tequila Talk**_**with Joe Walsh & Cliff Schecter** -- Thursdays at 6pm ET

We're leveling up, and we can't wait to see you there!
Here's what we're bringing you today:
* * *
### **An Open Letter to Journalists and Citizens**
A direct, urgent challenge to the press at a moment when democracy is under assault. This piece asks hard questions about silence, false balance, and the cost of pretending that authoritarianism is just another political strategy.
## [An Open Letter to Journalists and Citizens ](https://substack.com/redirect/9988f5f8-e33a-4697-813d-27bc9e8bc54d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
### **Minneapolis, I Hear Your Voice Singing**
[Cliff Schecter](https://open.substack.com/users/31941177-cliff-schecter?utm_source=mentions) details his reaction to Bruce Springsteen's raw, human response to grief, anger, and solidarity in the wake of state violence. This essay centers dignity, community, and the refusal to let truth be buried under official narratives.
[Culture](https://substack.com/redirect/d102e34d-048b-415e-b1af-ccf3558a1c40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

### **Bruce Springsteen, Billy Bragg, and the Sound of Resistance**
[Dana DuBois](https://open.substack.com/users/201342263-dana-dubois?utm_source=mentions) brings us cultural deep dive into protest music, working-class truth, and why songs still matter when institutions fail us. This is about art as memory, resistance, and moral witness.

To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. The BLUE Letter -- Saturday, January 31, 2026 Good evening, and welcome to The BLUE Letter. Big news before we dive in: Blue Amp Media is leveling up next week with the launch of three new shows , expanding our original programming and deepening what we do best--fearless journalism, sharp conversation, and pro-democracy truth-telling. This growth is happening because of you, and we're just getting started. | | ---|---|--- Here's what we're launching--and what directly helps pay for: CounterStory Perspectiveswith Melissa Corrigan -- Mondays at 2pm ET Deep Divewith Ellie Leonard -- Fridays at 2pm ET, focused on history, justice, and moral clarity Tequila Talkwith Joe Walsh & Cliff Schecter -- Thursdays at 6pm ET We're leveling up, and we can't wait to see you there! Here's what we're bringing you today: An Open Letter to Journalists and Citizens A direct, urgent challenge to the press at a moment when democracy is under assault. This piece asks hard questions about silence, false balance, and the cost of pretending that authoritarianism is just another political strategy. | | and | | ---|---|--- | Jan 30 | Minneapolis, I Hear Your Voice Singing details his reaction to Bruce Springsteen's raw, human response to grief, anger, and solidarity in the wake of state violence. This essay centers dignity, community, and the refusal to let truth be buried under official narratives. | | and | | ---|---|--- | 12:41 AM | Bruce Springsteen, Billy Bragg, and the Sound of Resistance brings us cultural deep dive into protest music, working-class truth, and why songs still matter when institutions fail us. This is about art as memory, resistance, and moral witness. | | and | | ---|---|--- | Jan 29 | Tequila Talk: Joe Walsh and Cliff Schecter Politics, media, democracy--and yes, tequila. name: Team Bera
subject: The stakes are higher than ever — here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

Trump and his cronies are constantly pushing policies that threaten the progress we’ve fought for — from health care to economic security to basic human dignity.

Those threats are exactly why this next election matters so much. With new district lines in place, **this campaign now faces a tougher landscape and the challenge of reaching new voters who deserve to hear directly from us.**

Your early and ongoing support ensures we can:
* Respond quickly to attacks on our values
* Communicate directly with voters
* Energize volunteers and organizers across the district

We’re building a movement that doesn’t just _react_ — it leads. But leadership needs resources. **_[That’s why we’re asking you to give today — before our deadline in a few hours.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124472454/598759285/-1179831629?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_AB_20260130_FR_EOM_0_6MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_1_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzZlZmVjZi0wZGZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NW2867g7KovhXHFRiV2FTm_1wPK2m9SfUrySq8-eLcE=)_ **We need to wrap up the month strong to show our opponents that we’re ready for every challenge in our new district. **[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124472455/598759286/-1179831629?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_AB_20260130_FR_EOM_0_6MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_1_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzZlZmVjZi0wZGZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NW2867g7KovhXHFRiV2FTm_1wPK2m9SfUrySq8-eLcE=)**
When you give, you fuel work that protects our community’s future — not special interests.

With gratitude,

Team Bera

name: Katie Porter
subject: I know it’s late so I’ll get right to it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Alright, I’m no fan of Breitbart but I need you to see this headline:
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260131_3_ak.CTzg6e&refcode=em20260131-40778&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=40778%2E3422442%2ERYiEM_)
**Republicans are giddy about the possibility that they could turn California red.** Because of California’s jungle primary, the top two candidates, regardless of party, will move on from June’s primary election to the general election in November.
**California could wind up with a Republican governor and I need your help to stop that from happening.**
I know it’s late so I’ll get right to it: Can you chip in $5 before midnight to help us hit our $25,000 goal and keep our campaign moving forward towards victory? Here’s a personal link where you can donate:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260131_3_ak?refcode=em20260131&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260131_3_ak.CTzg6e&refcode=em20260131-40778&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=40778%2E3422442%2ERYiEM_)
Thank you,
Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40778&t=3&akid=40778%2E3422442%2ERYiEM_)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40778)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40778&t=4&akid=40778%2E3422442%2ERYiEM_)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A last-ditch request from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Normally when I write to you via email, I like them to be different from the other messages you get from most elected officials.
Peter —
Normally when you see my name in your inbox, I like the messages to be different from the other emails you get from most elected officials.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, along with other things I am seeing or working on in Washington, D.C. and at home in Georgia.
This message is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:
This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation. I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024 and that makes me MAGA’s #1 target.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
**[Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Heartland Patriots today before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to a close.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100251?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jon Ossoff and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100252?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100252?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100252?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100252?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100252?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100252?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100251?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz)

The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can before our deadline. **[Please, contribute today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100251?refcode=em20260131-10007&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=10007%2E614464%2E7W_Lsz)**

Jon Ossoff

I’m writing to you directly because I don’t know who else I can trust right now. I just left a series of meetings that shook me: the kind of conversations that never make it into press briefings or fundraising emails. I’m not supposed to tell you what I heard. I’m not supposed to share anything written. Please understand: I’m asking you humbly to read it immediately. Quietly. I wouldn’t come to you like this if I had any other choice. — Mike Rogers Michigan U.S. Senate Candidate | | | Text JOIN to 22033 | |

name: Team Scott Wiener
subject: They want us to give up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott WIENER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |

We’ll be real with you, Peter:

The Trump administration is doing everything they can to overwhelm people - to flood the system with chaos and make us feel discouraged, exhausted, and powerless. _They want us to tune out and give up._

But here’s the problem - they’re not taking a single day off.

So neither can we.

**That’s why Scott is fighting harder than ever: to bring down the cost of living, tackle our housing crisis, hold Trump’s secret police accountable, protect our LGBTQ and immigrant communities, and defend scientific discovery and public health.**

These are fights Scott will take straight to Congress.

But with national attention on this race and at least one self-funded opponent, we can’t do it without grassroots support from people like you, Peter.

**That’s why we have to ask:**

subject: Tonight: A turning point for Michigan

body:
| | | Friend, **I'm going to be direct with you.** Our January Deadline is tonight at midnight, and we're not where we need to be. I spent eight years in the Army. I learned that you don't sugarcoat reality, you face it head-on and you fight through it. That's what I'm asking you to do with me right now. **We're behind. And the clock is running out.** Here's what this means: Every dollar we raise tonight determines how many voters we can reach tomorrow. It determines whether we can respond when we're attacked. It determines whether we have the resources to compete in every corner of this state. Michigan has been struggling. Our families are paying more for everything. Our businesses are being crushed by regulations. Our kids are falling behind in schools that should be world-class. **_We can fix this. But only if we have the resources to fight._** I'm not a career politician. I don't have party bosses writing me checks. I have people like you, Michiganders who are tired of watching our state decline.

name: DNC HQ
subject: Last chance
body:
---
Derek, We have just a few hours until our first end-of-month deadline of the year**tonight** at midnight. [**Can we count on you to make an $7 donation before we close the books this month?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260131_5966_fr&refcode2=5966_22930333_voRSuo&akid=5966%2E22930333%2EvoRSuo) $7 because a strong fundraising report this month will send a message to Trump and his Republican allies in Congress: we’re coming for your majority this year and for the White House in 2028. $7 because we just launched our largest ever voter registration campaign ahead of this year’s midterms, and that kind of investment is only possible grassroots support. $7 because the DNC is hard at work building the infrastructure we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in every corner of the country this year, **and we need your help to do it.** [**Last year, we saw our work pay off in a big way. We invested in every single state party. We held town halls in all 50 states. We organized everywhere so we could win anywhere, and it worked. Will you chip in $7 before tonight’s end-of-month deadline to help us do it again this year and in 2028?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260131_5966_fr&refcode2=5966_22930333_voRSuo&akid=5966%2E22930333%2EvoRSuo) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260131_5966_fr&refcode2=5966_22930333_voRSuo&akid=5966%2E22930333%2EvoRSuo)**

clean_body: Can you help us reach our goal by midnight? | | = Peter, It’s the end of my first week on the job, and I want to give you a quick update. But first: As Josh’s new campaign manager, it’s my responsibility to make sure we have the resources to keep this seat blue. Right now we’re facing a major problem: Our end-of-month deadline is tonight at midnight and we are falling $6,500 short of our goal. = = I’ve spent my first week on the job working with Josh to build an aggressive strategy to keep this seat blue. We’ve mapped out everything: digital ads, field organizing, mailers, yard signs, and more. If we execute this plan, I am confident that we’ll win this election. But if we don’t reach our goal, we’ll have to make cuts. Josh is doing the right thing by refusing to take corporate PAC money (because no one will be able to buy his vote in Congress), but that means our campaign is funded entirely by grassroots supporters like you. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- I can’t thank everyone enough for the warm welcome! — Mana Shooshtari Campaign Manager, Harder for Congress *

Peter ,
This week’s raid on Fulton County was a warning.
Trump wants control over every state’s voter rolls, ballot access, and local election officials. He knows his poll numbers are sinking, and so he’s using the DOJ to drag us back to the same conspiracy theories that collapsed in court years ago, but this time, they’re trying to dress it up as national security.
Before this year’s midterms, he’s laying the groundwork to sabotage turnout, discredit outcomes, and reject the results of the next election.
At GOTV PAC, we’re working to protect voters, track suppression tactics, and expose the chaos agents Trump is empowering.
This is a coordinated attack, and we need to respond with everything we’ve got.
Can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us push back and protect the vote in 2026? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1312026]

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. clean_body: [] Peter , This week’s raid on Fulton County was a warning. Trump wants control over every state’s voter rolls, ballot access, and local election officials. He knows his poll numbers are sinking, and so he’s using the DOJ to drag us back to the same conspiracy theories that collapsed in court years ago, but this time, they’re trying to dress it up as national security. Before this year’s midterms, he’s laying the groundwork to sabotage turnout, discredit outcomes, and reject the results of the next election. At GOTV PAC, we’re working to protect voters, track suppression tactics, and expose the chaos agents Trump is empowering. This is a coordinated attack, and we need to respond with everything we’ve got. Can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us push back and protect the vote in 2026? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] DONATE $500 [] Custom Donation [] GOTV PAC [] Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts. Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member. Learn more at: gotv.vote [] PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE GOTV PAC 712 H St NE PMB 96591 Washington, DC 20002 United States Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Friend, it's Mark.
I am suing the Secretary of Defense.
After 25 years in uniform and another 5 in the United States Senate, I never imagined I’d have to do something like this. Hegseth has left me no choice.
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to punish me because they don’t like what I have to say. Their attacks are directed at me right now, but they’re trying to send a message to every retired member of the military:
Speak out against us and we will come after you with every tool we have at our disposal. We’ll censure you, we’ll threaten your rank and retirement, and we might even court-martial you.
It’s unconstitutional, so I’m suing them. Beyond this lawsuit, it’s important we send a message to Trump and Hegseth to show them just how many people are on this team to defend constitutional rights. That’s where you come in.
I’ve been truly humbled by the support people have sent my way over the past couple of months. It means the world to me that so many of you care about what Trump and Hegseth are trying to do.
That’s how we’ve made it this far, and it’s how we’ll get to the other side of this chapter in our nation’s history. Together.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a stand and join the fight, this is it.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Take your National Quiz on the Constitution Today
body:
Far too many Americans do not know the meaning and purpose of the U.S. Constitution.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zleh0g2cjlf1li8t6v7fnv7hlrpbldts55atoeeg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgmaob1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Far too many Americans do not know the meaning and purpose of the U.S. Constitution.

To help address this problem, Hillsdale College created the **[National Quiz on the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5sg1kiimi86evn10j2dfaa02lci25no515vh0no_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgmaob1c1h2bs).**

It's short, enjoyable, and revealing.

**Take your quiz here:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/constitution-quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zps1oonrg6qq747ec5j4b153rgf4g3efkrjgeebo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgmaob1c1h2bs)

Good luck with your quiz!

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
