name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Fight Back Against Hollywoodâ€™sAgenda with Iggy and Mr. Kirk
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpg1sivvnechelmg1rn0bngo8pd9efreoe090s90_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs7to554e6685afi50ui3183n4pc563alr75uqf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ib8cjoipdo9fsvrm3c9kh5utgrngtsclkdpltg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg6guefl2el95g97445lu6rcvav2saso91tioddg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2k5ijb3c7u5l90d853fgidmfvep7uq55chorvag_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdfv29fnld04u4rmcpr9l07n8a9u100jdblotgp0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp1o34s8je4au8us2hodessqks03u91h6m65jon8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5r3tt7qvhg5mqf44g76atfekd6t9r4s08h7h4gg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55vcoa8gknmkja0fnpm30lqbpi803kkrmqaaoq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjgm9o32c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

name: American Action News
subject: Thomas Sowell Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z71aah9fcbqkm0al4tf210pg2jpu19j94pbj7na8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjim4or4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zde2i8af7f7gfsqou3j2gtle7npnrqgbmtdk3ll8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjim4or4clh2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrebs2jvcbi2egniet6s78lp30l73b5242dq3rn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjim4or4clh2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg1qgrh94ifon6oabhv04namm8f56enqsgf194po_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjim4or4clh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zle4elbrirduuoa5pbsh8bmr41cmags10nrqqcto_rp22sh2s8i6eor4sjim4or4clh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

# [Disbar Bondi and Don't Ever Let Her Practice Law Again](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5994584b-4046-43db-b2e1-ec6fae3f7bae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | _(Already took this action? Share it widely, and[click here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6aa3b71-d277-4942-9f0b-3fcef7ec4042/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for others)_ Pam Bondi may well be the worst and most dangerous attorney general in our nation's history. **[And she needs to be disbarred NOW, and banned for life from practicing law.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T715b6dc5-44d3-41c9-95b8-ed6fc586587f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** She has thrown away any concept of actual justice, and instead has weaponized DOJ to go after Trump's political opponents -- including multiple reporters just in the last 48 hours. She has repeatedly lied (the Epstein list was "on her desk" and then suddenly didn't exist), ignored criminal behavior from political allies (including from Trump himself), and essentially thrown away the law and the Constitution. Enough. It's time to fire her, disbar her, and make sure she never sets foot in a courtroom again, unless she's wearing handcuffs. **[Add your name: “Disbar Bondi and don't ever let her practice law again.”](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca7680e3-ffe4-426d-b270-de7fd2991466/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| |
# IN YOUR WEEKLY BULLETIN:
---
|
---
| |

When power is exercised without accountability, the damage rarely stays contained. This week’s _Sunday Bulletin_ examines what happens when institutions close ranks, political conflict spills into everyday life, and leadership choices ripple outward — from state agencies to city buses to the national stage.
**INVESTIGATIVE:** Two former employees of the Pennsylvania Game Commission allege a toxic, retaliatory workplace culture in which requests for medical accommodations were met with discipline and dismissal. Their claims, supported by documentation and corroborating accounts, raise serious questions about how state agencies treat long-serving employees — and what recourse exists when internal systems fail.
**POLITICS:** President Trump has formally endorsed Treasurer Stacy Garrity in the race for governor, while Pennsylvania’s political landscape continues to shift ahead of 2026. Meanwhile, a crowded field prepares for a pivotal forum in Philadelphia’s 3rd Congressional District, offering voters an early look at the battle to replace retiring Rep. Dwight Evans.
**REGIONAL NEWS:** From a violent assault aboard a SEPTA bus to a wave of homicides that stunned Bucks County, this week’s regional reporting captures moments where public safety, ideology, and human consequence collide — often in places meant to serve the public, not endanger it.
**FROM THE EDITORS:** An attack on a SEPTA bus becomes a lens for understanding modern political culture, online provocation, and the erosion of shared norms. As political theater increasingly bleeds into real-world spaces, the editors ask what responsibility leaders, activists, and institutions bear for restoring restraint.
**OPINION & ANALYSIS:** Our columnists take on Governor Josh Shapiro’s early presidential signaling, the spectacle of media narcissism in the digital age, and the deeper costs of politics driven by ambition rather than stewardship.
---
| [Read These Articles HERE](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7f6688c8c8&e=b7b3eddce2)

| Across the country, Republicans are launching an unprecedented mid-decade redistricting blitz. Their goal is simple: rig the maps, erase Democratic seats, and manufacture a permanent MAGA majority.
They can't win on the issues, so they're rigging elections.
Our final line of defense against MAGA's election rigging are State Supreme Courts:

In 2026, the control over three crucial swing state courts will be decided in Arizona, Michigan, and Georgia.
If the MAGA seizes these benches, they gain total control. They will rubber-stamp illegal maps that wipe Democrats off the map.
In November, Defend Our Courts helped deliver a massive blowout victory in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court election. But with the House on the line and three swing state courts in the crosshairs, we must triple our efforts to make the same impact in 2026.
These are the most consequential races for Democrats next year.
[If we lose the courts, MAGA could seize control of the House for a decade to come. We need to get to work now, there is no time to lose. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | Tax Lien List | Have you checked out the from your state? name: The Flyover
subject: Bomb Cyclone Threatens Southeast, Rybakina Wins Open, and TV Dinners Remebered
body:
States along the Southeast coast braced for the effects of [a “bomb cyclone”](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7hwdMAZcUGyTLttuafFziFlhiODcWHn7K99XuM1Io5FGM9-_x_awKafy_GsPNBTrVvDsGYmwba4ezn98rgVpb2gJS-_1i_aNA5cT8AnYFmzKn02MwUREjvOIhim5rkKAXsbdRKtc0FygXgRXzinlmGNx9oEFOTMck7nagANjDDTMN4AIDiVoK7xdnB0EYEhU2-1_TYV2jPlT39huvh5jNjvRqw_zn4HfB363r-vAFV2mUfIZB34_UyFsU6fajgltp8nXS3up5xRzraFPMUqOTrKwqlnrBQKCiGwNi1wAVwZjM-F1ppxTl2oQ8Dxsyj8j6Ffk3oZ_BwAA__9blYI_) on Saturday, including dangerous cold and blizzard conditions in a fast-developing storm, the winter equivalent of a hurricane.

# Sunday, February 1, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1861, [Texas formally seceded](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0E1OhDAUAODTlN2Q1x-gLLowUaIxY4yJMXFDCn0M1dIS-pgJtzd6BS_wLb6Pc3-2Pvh4ebELGppSH_GWAxLh1g9pGcZjDCkizRtawphz2mnuBYj6BOIEvHfWh6NXhTMTokBZoOFN3bZKga6K2QjNK-kaCbpqK6uBg5BylG2j3QAobeHNrwYCOOegQZYAEwxYg7ZqtNVgmQJ0ntJWfiUfacYpHOmKWzmmpQhmJlozk3dMdEx0R9ppLwdkomu0bZ_d69mPT0x22TN5v8ZVfW7va_w-TY9vD7bYjFtvPgSf64YpuCzWhz-X_pVxNeInAAD__1yHcYw) from the Union when a state convention in Austin voted 166–8 in favor. The move, later ratified by voters, followed a Unionist boycott and the removal of Gov. Sam Houston from office, after he refused to back the Confederacy. When TV dinners arrived in the 1950s, they changed America's relationship with more than just the meal. While the term itself has faded away, the pre-packaged meal lives on in a broader, healthier way, as we find out in today's ["Whatever Happened To..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdTSWq59nFyoCBOpe2pQCKa7MDShSIFd2dPvAukLKwTeYGczv7_nbcuT0_GU3GmXNc6J3jSRCZXZ5c8u5xJxIQiErlGrNh4QZAQcNqMHM3nI8567x40qE1DY0mq_h8eg6uPdNGHFpe9tbb4Fcax7ge9f2bu2RXGex8w2PnzRAMMbAHdobwAqOBrjbbrG9s6oD8iy53P5kThJojWd-UbkteWviGET2qtofCieFkwR6FxaKvNJgPhaFE4K5K5zgoXAyoHB68ov0RrryX71xOoSqtslrjlFf7MyHrse-U9ESSFfJ5dR5vYS8tOeUqHwa2-mQba75KAup9ucSrDx3uaaV0e9vjpHr8KU6eG6W4wXkv45-jfgvAAD__53Bk6Y) segment. From today's sponsor, [Brad's Deals: Check out these 9 Amazon Prime perks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbuunDAQhp_GdF4Z29wKikgrupM2pTXYAzjxhdjmIPL0EZuVUkdpvxn9_-ibbx_qA6yzYf0KHseyRBXwzA5LwaTm6Gd9aRcDli0hFAw5x6NsijPeUsYpq5UB6y4lKzMuiBxFhWPdtcMgJeubahtrKY3oWmg01h0bTGeGrm7k0DPsl07wyo53GuOsrmvWM_FgbGEztqwHqaGZgUiGxpaYHt-jDWXDxV3xE9NDR1-5cStlz0R8IXwifDrP8zEnMNkguHyvED7NLq6ETzWj4OFXDHRP1iOdMeBiS6ZXPKiHi4ZY6I8QTwpzPAoR01G8yvFIGol4_m2mpgDh7T31aOzhiXgam3cH1xtr8DvYNRDx_MfWP1rp7YTwVitrXhkDbwhvQf9UPhpw9znpwDfaIJkVCr5plUazn9Y5m9uOSLZ6sO5lq_zXiz9H_jsAAP__2mu9fQ) you need to be using to help save you money on the everyday items you are already purchasing.

## Dangerous Snowstorm Takes Aim at Southeast
States along the Southeast coast braced for the effects of [a “bomb cyclone”](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7hwdMAZcUGyTLttuafFziFlhiODcWHn7K99XuM1Io5FGM9-_x_awKafy_GsPNBTrVvDsGYmwba4ezn98rgVpb2gJS-_1i_aNA5cT8AnYFmzKn02MwUREjvOIhim5rkKAXsbdRKtc0FygXgRXzinlmGNx9oEFOTMck7nagANjDDTMN4AIDiVoK7xdnB0EYEhU2-1_TYV2jPlT39huvh5jNjvRqw_zn4HfB363r-vAFV2mUfIZB34_UyFsU6fajgltp8nXS3up5xRzraFPMUqOTrKwqlnrBQKCiGwNi1wAVwZjM-F1ppxTl2oQ8Dxsyj8j6Ffk3oZ_BwAA__9blYI_) on Saturday, including dangerous cold and blizzard conditions in a fast-developing storm, the winter equivalent of a hurricane. Cities along the North Carolina and Virginia coast were expected to see [7 to 12 inches of snow](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGK3DAQRL9GvsnIbY1sH3QIBN8mlxByNG2pPVYiS4PUO4P_fvH-wl4KioKi6v29L3cMMaTHLzzI8paXRO8aiZnKsuZjdaeLORHvhZAp1Zo_eF9AgZEKpOoWjyGei2683YiA-oZsN5hp0lqNt2a3W6-d0WCcQVR6GPR0g9EY7bDHbdK-CfZqU6C6rlOj6lulNrWSUSNqh7cVhVbkA-fS_ssh8U5bPPOLSuvy0US7Mz-r6H8ImAXMuLrrQfvIVyxg_vNbwPzMTIkDRplyIaxMRe6Enry8nHT50jfRf0peRmSqLLdcyGFlAXPlXE7Rz8GL_mcHk4FJw9QU65_vEGOoZhBaPQ4M8WsVfwvly8JnAAAA__8N_ojS) on Saturday and Sunday, along with wind gusts up to 70 mph. In [North Carolina](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1u7CAQAODTQLdoGOO_guI17vZpu5QIw3hNhMHCZNHePkqukAt8xfdxN3cbYkjP__YgXbdsErUrUq1UzJqP1b1dzInqXshWSteVv-puEHC4Ad5AGm9DfBvFvd6IkDpOWo7DPCsFU893jQrdNDsrRwQ3z0pK1fUKN-V76V038qB_NECQUsIEnQDYYKUBJquc7VfLFJAPNRfxmUOqO23xnV9UhMsHj3qv9bxY94_hwnBprYl2OpEcnSJla8Uzvxguj5JX8yjkwslw4UX7s4UYwzWMTMHzsCH-evVPCS-N3wEAAP__n5dwLQ), forecasts called for 5–7 inches of snow in Asheville, while Raleigh prepared for 4–7 inches. [Widespread flight cancellations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdKDx4BAoXGxDl223RMYeB-8aO7InQdmvfyJ6f_CqKUY6957757bcTIgh3X-bnTT7vCQ6aiRmKsua99W-bcyJeCtkmFKt-cnbgoBDC9iCXJwJ8b2oxmlPhNQ3pOV1mCalYLw0m1YwKgkWwKtpncbBu8kO3q12orFH6ZqgTxogSClhhL4D8LDSAKNR1lxWIxSQC5xL9zeHxBv5-M4vKp3NexP1xvyoov8lcBY4H8fR-VxWqudb4FwDUz3v879JiUo-TPpHMdJGReB8ZgucQQqcexA4n9Ltt3X7sSVTud2DMxxN4mBbH8N94xPaFO0eR4gx1OEqFNx3E-KnF_9ozJfGrwAAAP__TZ2KCg) were anticipated just one week after a winter storm that led to nearly 20,000 flight cancellations over the three days from Saturday to Monday.
## Funding Deal Leads to Partial Shutdown
A [partial federal government shutdown](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAUBOCnwR3WAf9uQREpcrdRupQWhoMhwbCC41357SPfV7j1SJ9m5s9zfeoQQ9p_6QMVubwm_NSIRFjWLR-buUzMCckX1ISp1nySXyXIkYPkIFarQ7zWvrHKIUrsGlRiGh-Pvod5aLxydh6EmYZtxAkABejRORisMYPpUGAT1K2BBCEEzNC1AA42HGHWvdHDplkPaAPl0v7NIZFHF6_8xtKafDRReaJXZd0PJhcmF72Ze0G75ztmcvmdY6BgKpPLXrTXB99iNv-0RV5Jx1j5fmPpwETcncmGtHOLOnKfz1J59SfZ_ElMLpVyuVi3BMu6n0I-JiH7QTZF2dcnxBjqOLEe9kOH-NWNvnXoW8n_AQAA__-uHoxk) went into effect early on Saturday, but the funding lapse is expected to be brief. The Senate voted on Friday to [separate extended funding](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0O3CAQhJ_G7jitMf65giKNu0ub0sKwNiQYLHbv0L195LxCupFGGs33_XqtLxNiSMdPc6LmPa8JK0VkxrJu-dzs18ackH1Bw5iI8pv9KkGOAqSAbnUmxO-qWqd3RIl9i7qbxudTKZiH1murRqkmKzvZb7OdzDhPz87ZGdwg-xmnNuh7DSR0XQcz9A-AHTYcYTbKmmEzjQJ0gXN5_M4hscc9fvMHy8Pms43aM1_U9D8auTRyqbU-0mZvirtv5HLlGDhYauRiczoK0h0Jk2EUlyFCEluIURSkHD8oyL_Z5ZqEjYa8uN6JQzqE8yS4ZlER_5AoNhk5jIOCtmh31RBjoHFqFBynCfHfN_4voR8t_wYAAP__N4CNCA) for the Department of Homeland Security after a White House deal delayed negotiations two weeks over Democratic demands to restrict Immigration and Customs Enforcement. However, the House is not expected to approve the changes [until Monday at the earliest.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u6yAUhFcDHdHhx2AXFK9xl9fe0sLmEIgwRIYk8u6vki3cbkYjzWi-n-tydSmncvvvdrQ91KXgu2XsHY9lrfu6nVuuBXs80HUsrdVnj4sAoRkIBnzxLuVzUdTbgChQUrTc6GlSCsaBRqsdBg2Sj1rKME7rZMY1GMW9M2rgk6TJftpAAOccRpAXgAArahid2tywOqIAfer1uNxrKj1iyGd94XHZ6k6zjb0_GpH_iJiJmHvEmHL-ZETMse74OfSVz4ZEzIPhigvDvp6FZ_Gp3JhHl1nD4jqyvRbvTnavsbRaiJjpYf3jnXJOTRui4La79F2g_U_IXlb8BgAA__9E3IBr) Democrats are [pressing for changes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DmUftBowJHGwy2d90Q9TYzeCVsZFp_mhuv2Kv8MNSqUpV78_X_EUxxfz6TTs7Wcuc-X0mFuE6L2Vf_Menklm2yiScz7Ncss0IaBSgAj0Hiukz921wKzNy17LTo5mmvgc7tJsDo8fgkfw6msHCiHYiNNpaY_04ELXR3W2AoLUGC90DYIWFDVjqPQ0LNT1wiFLq42-JWTZe06d8c334srfJbSLH2XS_Gnw2-KTjPnBbt6gSfeIGn687kHfOos7tklDeWVU-riVFT1lJvfZDRc9qKzsnykGd7K8a5aM0LziC4RV9v06azERgu4Add7DQNLTVheMdU4qnGZseXjvF9H-b_Ajot8N_AQAA__9svYsE) they believe are necessary to prevent future abuses, including requiring immigration agents to wear body cameras, carry clear identification, and end roving patrols in cities.
## List: Top Supermarket Chains
Trader Joe's edged Publix atop the list of [2026 supermarket rankings](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OnDAQAJ8GOqO1-b3CRRq6S5sS2WYNjoz3ZC_H8fbR5RW-fjQjzZ_n8jQhhrT9Ngdq9rQkvEpEZsyLpcO620VKyHtGw5hKoZP3RYEaBCgBcllNiPfS1av2iArbGrUch8ej62Dq61279jFZZ2G06yTd0EuvYJSjHPuxt2vb10F_baBASgkTtA2AB4sDTKZzprem6gDXwJSbvxQS7-jjTW_MjaOjjnpnfpWq_VWpuVLzdV2Np489S0hYypep1IyOEh13peYtk8N8i8KUUeC6YRF0snidNoaPMAfm4EwR3rwpB8Y66_V1hRhDGcaqg-0wIf4v8492vbX6FwAA___HGoHH), according to a survey by the American Customer Satisfaction Index. [Trader Joe's](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzGO6yAQgOHT2F2sYcAkLiheky6v3RIBHgIRNhHMxsrtV9krbP_rk_6vm725XPJ-_-82Mhyr3enohZipWV83H96h1J04NXJMe-_1m5NFQH0CPIGwq8vlbdW4mkiEJEcy4qyXRSm4zGMyWp29DLOWwiPCIr3GZYkq6FmSjw7GbD4aIAgh4AJyAojgScPFqeBm7wYFtGaubXrUvHOiWN71RW0KdRuLSczPPsh_A14HvB7HMXFzK7VHpf5JBrymutHYzPo8cim56_Og4L65XH4J_tP3y-BPAAAA__-P_GyC), known for its private-label, specialty products, has locations in 42 states and the District of Columbia. [Publix](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOtAwGHAKF9vQZdst0WDGwSuDkT0kj79_St4nvPbq6Fzp_LtPd_LB74-_tLERF6edXzmwCKdpjttsLxvizrImJuE953jKOiFgXwFW0EwL-XBNqlyMY0ZuSzbN0N9uSoHuytWoph_s4lANesFODxp61aKCW9ciaqLSm7cNEJqmAQ1tDeBg5h40KUvdTIUCXrzEVP-PfpeVXbjik1Nt41YGs4ocuWj_FDgWONqYjphIuD7OOfivN1TgSHM8pfqZPtR20H5Vb83T86vA0ZGVXDn_OBPnMpnlePkQfO6HQsFjIx8-f_KrSE-D3wEAAP__xql80Q) has more than 1,400 locations in eight states, with close to 900 in the chain’s home state of Florida. H-E-B, Sam’s Club, and Aldi round out the top five. [Giant Eagle ranked last](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFygzAQQNHTiM7MsshCLlSkoXPalIxAK7OJQB5pbQ-3zzhXSPuLV_yv63T1nHi_ffqNnMQ87fSqiUSoTHPe5uVYUt5J1kJeaK81P2SdENCcAE_QTcFzOibdBBeJkPqGXDeYy0VrsOdmdT2BHiyeQ-iNMd5gtDFSD9YPGIaLbdi9NUDoug4s9C1AhJkMWK8Xf5690kCBJZf2O_MuK8V05CeVdslbk9wqcq-q_1A4KhxlJb9UbnO5KRx5D48qhakqHAuJ56RwrI87lc2XH5J3b4oL9xenxNUMSsNt85z-cPnXkafD3wAAAP__IVx13g), based on factors including store layout and cleanliness, website satisfaction and checkout speed.

**Whatever happened to TV dinners?** TV dinners appeared as postwar America rearranged itself around two new household fixtures: the freezer and the television. It was Swanson's “TV dinner” concept of the early 1950s that sold families on the dream of a hot meal with minimal kitchen time. How did the product originate? In 1953, Swanson found itself with 260 tons of excess turkey, and an executive proposed packaging the turkey into compartmentalized aluminum trays (inspired by airline meal trays), adding sides like stuffing, peas, or sweet potatoes, and selling it as a complete heat-and-eat meal [marketed for eating in front of the television](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdTSWq59nFyoCBOpe2pQCKa7MDShSIFd2dPvAukLKwTeYGczv7_nbcuT0_GU3GmXNc6J3jSRCZXZ5c8u5xJxIQiErlGrNh4QZAQcNqMHM3nI8567x40qE1DY0mq_h8eg6uPdNGHFpe9tbb4Fcax7ge9f2bu2RXGex8w2PnzRAMMbAHdobwAqOBrjbbrG9s6oD8iy53P5kThJojWd-UbkteWviGET2qtofCieFkwR6FxaKvNJgPhaFE4K5K5zgoXAyoHB68ov0RrryX71xOoSqtslrjlFf7MyHrse-U9ESSFfJ5dR5vYS8tOeUqHwa2-mQba75KAup9ucSrDx3uaaV0e9vjpHr8KU6eG6W4wXkv45-jfgvAAD__53Bk6Y). It took off immediately. By the 1960s and 1970s, frozen dinners became a routine: Salisbury steak nights, corn that tasted faintly of the tray, and that fizzy thrill of peeling back foil like you were unwrapping the future. [Here’s a 1955 Swanson's TV commercial](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVvQwTYEBg-RrjLdRB2qVuqCDvg4dmpwBCexePuKvkLX75N-w__z0l8wxDDfrjiRYZf6mfIaiZmWfkjTMG5jTDOxXwiZ5nVNT_a9BNkcQB6g6i2GuPW6sMYRSVIFmerYdJ3W0NaFN3XtdDW0XSsR6o6oQWcbZ7HDWh1HJYtgdg0kVFUFLagSwMFADbSoR6wHFBrIBk5LeU9hZk8ubulFSzmmqYjGMz9WoU5CnoU855zLLT35OdD-7wvy6IU6v4T69_8j369vj-_3r1OxGPvIIcawNkeh4TZhiL8k_6nDy8ifAAAA__--o3IE). The fast growth of TV dinners wasn’t really about taste. It was about _permission_ : permission to skip the table, skip the dishes, skip the whole performance of dinner. It matched suburban living rooms and TV-tray tables, and it fit a country sprinting toward convenience and more dual-income schedules. The decline came in slow motion. By the late 20th century, “TV dinner” started to sound like a punchline—processed, salty, beige—while microwaves and new packaging quietly shifted the product into the broader category of “microwave meals” and “frozen prepared meals.” But the category itself never died. Frozen foods boomed during the pandemic—one industry report pegged U.S. frozen food retail sales at $65 billion in 2020, up 21% year over year. And market researchers estimate the U.S. frozen food market at $83.5 billion in 2024, still growing. So what happened? The “TV dinner” became the “frozen meal,” with the same basic promise, upgraded with more global flavors, more “healthy” positioning, and more premium options, leaving aluminum tray nostalgia behind. _Do you remember TV dinners? Did you have a favorite meal?__Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

() Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Feeling Forgetful? It Might Not Be Aging...Do you catch yourself forgetting names or misplacing things more often? Northwestern scientists discovered one common mistake that can age your memory by 20–30 years. Now, a breakthrough herb shown in six human studies can help improve memory speed and quality — fast. Support sharper thinking and better focus, starting in just 45 minutes. | Whatever happened to TV dinners? TV dinners appeared as postwar America rearranged itself around two new household fixtures: the freezer and the television. It was Swanson's “TV dinner” concept of the early 1950s that sold families on the dream of a hot meal with minimal kitchen time. How did the product originate? In 1953, Swanson found itself with 260 tons of excess turkey, and an executive proposed packaging the turkey into compartmentalized aluminum trays (inspired by airline meal trays), adding sides like stuffing, peas, or sweet potatoes, and selling it as a complete heat-and-eat meal . It took off immediately. By the 1960s and 1970s, frozen dinners became a routine: Salisbury steak nights, corn that tasted faintly of the tray, and that fizzy thrill of peeling back foil like you were unwrapping the future. . The fast growth of TV dinners wasn’t really about taste. It was about permission : permission to skip the table, skip the dishes, skip the whole performance of dinner. It matched suburban living rooms and TV-tray tables, and it fit a country sprinting toward convenience and more dual-income schedules. The decline came in slow motion. By the late 20th century, “TV dinner” started to sound like a punchline—processed, salty, beige—while microwaves and new packaging quietly shifted the product into the broader category of “microwave meals” and “frozen prepared meals.” But the category itself never died. Frozen foods boomed during the pandemic—one industry report pegged U.S. frozen food retail sales at $65 billion in 2020, up 21% year over year. And market researchers estimate the U.S. frozen food market at $83.5 billion in 2024, still growing. So what happened? The “TV dinner” became the “frozen meal,” with the same basic promise, upgraded with more global flavors, more “healthy” positioning, and more premium options, leaving aluminum tray nostalgia behind. # Sunday, February 1, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1933, the United States and Mexico signed the [Rio Grande Rectification Treaty](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyqzAQAL9GdDDikIVVqHgNnV-bkhHSAZfIEiNdjP33GecXUmy7O7Mft_nmKFLa_rs7Wn6ueU541ojMWObK3wETHyUzVq6UHliZNsczSNCthFb2c3AUX7Nqgl1kMH2Dth-1MWqE8dLsdvH96pzXqxmNHpZRXwezXMwVtJOD9tCQfcskyL5_M3QIwYCGoJdeKaeUUBIDcS4d78j4dHWNr_zA0vl8b6LdmY8qhn8CJgHTeZ4d193lFClhl8smYNpdCkvOXwImTFwIq4CpUG634lLAtqBnWsk7ppzao-RP9NwUG46TYqSqR6HkdncUf5v8t1MPCz8BAAD__579f_0) to straighten a 155-mile stretch of the river from El Paso to Fort Quitman through the construction of a 66-foot-wide channel and a 590-foot-wide floodway. The U.S. provided 88% of the funding for the $5 million project. In today’s _Et Cetera_ , we reveal how a decorated Air Force veteran from Clovis and his wife are receiving a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Super Bowl 60, courtesy of Cowboys wide receiver CeeDee Lamb. [See all the details below](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2OpDAQhJ_GZB7ZbdYzBAQnjcj20guRf5qhtQYju4Gdtz9x0j3BBp20uqvqU_35HD8dJVpfv92CPX9PeVzxrAmZsYyV94grbyUzVq60HliZXo5HUGClAqn0GB2l99g2sfcqdrrBXt9t17V3uH80c_946O4R7PSI1rtw_-gm6NBM1tspGAPQUH-JKVBaX2NuCLEDC9F63baubUWrMBLncuMZGb9dndI7H1huIS9N6mfmrQrzS8AgYDjP83YhhNmtKyatrisBw2UiYFBawGCUgCGkfFCVBzIWt8qCAenAKuu-YZE-n0kyhS_kKkPeC2N9y5BPn99VnhTx_0eRATEiyuQWf2Uww87LWPNeAgrzZOdzTk6AvdYLRtoXYZ65vNxKISQKX1WAZV9wEuY5b03p43ZSSlTtXbTqtThK_1j5Zw0dPfwNAAD__7P_qSw). ## Ed. Commissioner Investigates Student Protests
Gov. Greg Abbott [ordered Texas Education Commissioner](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp_G7rBgQrBcUGzjLttuafEzTkbCEMEkTt5-5fuj-wC3mG509J3z77JcHCXK179uQ8uvtSwZ95aQGevS-BEx870WxsaN8hMb09XxAhKMkCCkWqKj9F50H62XcVI9WjWaadIjjOf-ZvUJ_NmADhjD6lBKB4AeVPQrojTYkz1gEqRSx50GhDiBgWi80tpp3WmJkbjUgW_I-HJtTe_yxDqEsvXJ3pjvrTv96WDuYN73fVjLa3SPxpSPlw7mw6mD2XlfmEWkioGbwPgIjqlkEcq2UWtUMlbxo4nikyKoRfEVQ1BA8V2krzbed0qJmhk7La-bo_Qxi38X82nhfwAAAP__taCPFg) Mike Morath to investigate district-wide student protests at 14 Austin Independent School District campuses tied to concerns about Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Gov. Abbott’s announcement, which came in an [X post](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6jAQRb_G6UDjyWCTwsWTntKx7ZaWgyfBkomRPUD4-1X2F7a4zS3Okc73xV9CymldvsKdnWxz8Su_W2YRrr7JM_Iqj1qEm7S0vrhJWoJ4BDQHwANoH0PKH09ddBPEQXfstDXDQBbtqbu5MLG1ZtaxN4Bx1mHqDVgwJ7ieh_mMXXI7DBC03tcfGeOABqOZNFEgUgQck5R6lBsLb6HN-VNeXI_Xcu-yu4k8mur_KRwVjtv-KhyXykuYpiLiZVM4NgnybApHBG0JEC3BiQydtR1UPzbV_yfTVRcf75RzasYqguUeUv7VyN_ivBz-BAAA___TrnW1), said, “ _Our schools are for educating our children, not political indoctrination_. “ Austin ISD Superintendent Matias Segura said the protests, which were held last Thursday and Friday, [weren’t sponsored](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2u2zAMRp9G3hjItCzFg4cu3m7XjoZ-6ISobAUWE9_79oWDFn2AO3AicIBzvl8f84fnzNvtp19plM-lzBsdNZMI7XOVZ6JNHnsRqlJ5e1EVvnmZUaMFjaDbOXnOX7Np0hh0GtqGxtbZYTAOXd_cx2s3LKa30VrTBbuEXvc6-EBD7Cy1LjQ8njCNum3P6y6EaUCLyYbWGG-MMpoSS9kvciehT1-X_FVetF9iWZs83kUeVXU_FE4Kp-M4Lsfi_flUOPldOGZSOJ1eCqdcos8KpzcIbidnKzv4EIoIJN4pSgVKz-iFywaxrCvXymWjHf4XIPDPKrwB1wR_O8Hh8-_ylAr_iimc0A6AMVjqYoDBRQeG2gV8Mh24GNw1uKsxPTb7mB4H58zVOmX0bfWc34byvV1eI_4JAAD__0L2pUo) by the school system. Segura also said that schools can’t physically stop students from leaving, but that leaving campus is considered an unexcused absence. Several of the walkouts were organized by students, and school resource officers were on hand to ensure safety.
## Congressional District Runoff
Voters in Texas’ 18th Congressional District voted on Saturday between Democrats Christian Menefee and Amanda Edwards in a special election runoff to fill the long-vacant Houston-area seat. A runoff election [was held](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGu3SAMhp-GbETgcJKbgaEL2-3aMeIEk2OJQATOyb1vX6Vqn6CDrX-wrO_T_-tz-fSUKG8__Y6Wv2JZMl4tITPWpfEZMPNRC2PjRvmNjWnzvICCUSqQSi_BU_peTBfsU4VZd2j1NM6zmWB6dC8bIQ5ao4l-BG_UOOjh4zFN0zPCEHyEjuz9TIHS-p6hRwgzjBDGpzbGGyOMwkBcas8vZPzyLabv8sbar2Xvkn0xH00MPwQ4Ae66rv5VzsYlH-cz0bpjIN-XuglwvjKtCZsAd2sKcEdJxLTeEROuTCXf-UYS4JQW4IZ7PQzoxyzA1TOXGOW_Y1mxnYmbXEveKrYmAzWutLLUH_IviMRw-Rqa3DFjRBTgumrDcVFK1MZJGLXtntIfIf6_Gt4WfgcAAP__nx2eFg) yesterday to fill the vacancy in Texas’ 18th Congressional District. Houston-district voters decided between Democrats Christian Menefee, former Harris County Attorney, and Amanda Edwards, former Houston City Council member. The congressional seat was formerly held by U.S. Rep. Sylvester Turner, who passed away last March. Sixteen candidates were on last November’s ballot — which had no primaries — but none of the candidates received the 50% plus one vote to avoid a runoff. Menefee and Edwards were the highest vote-receivers. The winner will hold the seat for the remainder of Turner’s term before elections will be held in March, where they’ll [be challenging](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_uozAMx58mbCDHCQSGDCf9xNZbb0QpMW2kQFBiSvv2JzrcC9xgL7Y-3z9_btPNhRi2x2-3kuX3kqaNzhKJmfJU-PC08Z4TU-ESthcVDg_HEwJ2NWANcvIuxM-kK2_v4AdZkZWmGwZt0LTV0w6txhlcjwbVYFoAZST05FEPqp2Nq4K9YIAg5TWqIfQDdui7u9TaaS00kA-ccsNPYnq7ssRPelFu5rRW0T6Z9yLUL4GjwPE8z2ZPMXCY0_UgcLwSCRwvGYEjSIGjutaXVcu-zseWlqX2tJYawLR9J7VQ48HrNKeNaWOhfjjtYf5H665jSUeeSaifJYb9nlz2VbZ-P0OMoXRGaHisLsSvT_6_dl8W_wYAAP__mdCMag) Rep. Al Green.
## Olympian Snubbed From Games
Five-time [Olympic skeleton racer Katie Uhlaender](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAURb8GOwwcGRwLitfQzWtfaVCOSgbFwHnDzN_feHP_4Ba72tkrO-vfY3y4EMOx_nU7GnovaTywlohEmMdC_z0edOZEWKiE44WFwupoBAGaC-BCjt6F-BlV480k_CAbNLLXw6B66G_NZu7DPHV3LTol1W3p3Typue_0TcsJne-gCeaCCRBSXulaBD-ABq8nqZRTiimBPlDKLW1I-HZliZ_0wtzOaW-i2YjOwro_DCwDW2ttn5XeV8nAXmwGVkgGthMMbIqf_QwzL0-MSOngjraIhHyf14xrynwJ60aFlzMRr-EgzPxnVBjYJht_1hBjKLpnSqy7C_H7Cf3O38vAVwAAAP__Q0uFlA) of MacGregor was left out of the Milan Cortina Winter Games after an investigation found Team Canada manipulated results in an Olympic qualifying event. Team Canada [withdrew four racers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ8GOiMzceBSuLgNXbbdEg32JIzkH2RPQvL2K_YVtjjVJx2d833flhty4PT4wkhW3ve8JDpqIBEqS5WnpyR7yUJVKqcXVeEHygIaBqVB6X7xyOGzmNbbVfupb8n24zBNZoTx2m7WGTD-Ol61c96YnuifN6tfnXYj6nWElu1ZpkH3_ZlLR-AnGMAPa28MGtMYTZ4ll042EnpjvYdPflHpXI5tsJvIXpvL_wbmBubjOLp7fp8vTt7AXPdcpDYwC2FUDhN6VBET78-AQl65HHcSFs5JuVxFYaTCDpOqWxYVOeAJinBClcMn7uxqW6zfDw6B6zA2Rj8icvhdJH_z-LLwEwAA__9syYyU) from the North America Cup, an event held in Lake Placid earlier this month, and reduced the amount of points needed to qualify for the Olympics. The reduction in points made it impossible for Uhlaender to qualify. Uhlaedner, along with four other nations and three other racers, appealed the decision. She reached out to the Court of Arbitration for Sport in an attempt to land a wild card spot for the Olympic team. She also reached out to Vice President J.D. Vance, who is leading the U.S.’s Olympic delegation.

Greg Abbott Mike Morath to investigate district-wide student protests at 14 Austin Independent School District campuses tied to concerns about Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Gov. Abbott’s announcement, which came in an , said, “ Our schools are for educating our children, not political indoctrination. “ Austin ISD Superintendent Matias Segura said the protests, which were held last Thursday and Friday, by the school system. Segura also said that schools can’t physically stop students from leaving, but that leaving campus is considered an unexcused absence. Several of the walkouts were organized by students, and school resource officers were on hand to ensure safety. Congressional District Runoff Voters in Texas’ 18th Congressional District voted on Saturday between Democrats Christian Menefee and Amanda Edwards in a special election runoff to fill the long-vacant Houston-area seat. A runoff election yesterday to fill the vacancy in Texas’ 18th Congressional District. Houston-district voters decided between Democrats Christian Menefee, former Harris County Attorney, and Amanda Edwards, former Houston City Council member. The congressional seat was formerly held by U.S. Rep. Sylvester Turner, who passed away last March. Sixteen candidates were on last November’s ballot — which had no primaries — but none of the candidates received the 50% plus one vote to avoid a runoff. Menefee and Edwards were the highest vote-receivers. The winner will hold the seat for the remainder of Turner’s term before elections will be held in March, where they’ll Rep. Al Green. Team Canada from the North America Cup, an event held in Lake Placid earlier this month, and reduced the amount of points needed to qualify for the Olympics. body:

| **_FROM THE DESK OF RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
Dear Friend,
---
When I was arrested in Fulton County in the most violent jail in America, I could’ve made all the legal battles magically disappear overnight...
---
_...I could’ve betrayed the truth by going on camera, dropping to my knees, and saying that the 2020 election was perfectly fair, transparent, and completely free of fraud!_
---
In fact, some who were arrested __did__ take plea deals.
---
**But the President and I did NOT.**
---
Our position was clear: **__NEVER_ _SURRENDER_!_**
---
As the old saying goes, “I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”
---
_And now, the TRUTH is finally coming out:_
---
**“Fulton County admits to verifying 315,000 votes in 2020 without poll worker signatures”**
_-Atlanta News First_
---
But unfortunately, bloodthirsty left-wing tyrants do not care about the truth.
---
**I am _still_ being PROSECUTED by a vengeful Democrat Attorney General who wants to imprison me as part of her re-election campaign platform _this_ year.**
---
And with reports of a blue wave coming, she thinks she can get away with it – because voters will not stop her.
---
_Well, I beg to differ..._
---
_The people can stop her right here, right now by signing onto the People’s Defense of Rudy W. Giuliani in light of new evidence that adds even MORE doubt to the integrity of the 2020 election._

name: Adam Shaikh
subject: ZEESHAN FOR TEXAS | Response Requested | Volunteer opportunities
body:
Hi everyone!! My name is Adam Shaikh and a field lead with Zeeshan's
campaign.

I hope you’re doing well. I’m reaching out because we’re continuing to
build real momentum here in TX-33, and we need your help. *Can we count on
you??*

Our campaign is powered by volunteers, and right now there are two easy
ways to get involved:

*Canvassing (block walking)*
You’ll be talking directly with voters in the community, sharing
information about the campaign, and helping us make sure people feel seen
and heard. *No experience needed* — we provide training, materials, and
you’ll always be paired with others if it’s your first time. *We need the
most help here, on the ground, canvassing.*

*Phone Banking*
If getting out in the field isn’t your thing, phone banking is a great
alternative. You can help us reach voters from anywhere, we’ll train you
beforehand, and scripts are provided. It’s straightforward and incredibly
impactful. *Everyone can do this, even remotely!!*

Whether you can give an hour or a few hours, it truly makes a difference.
If you’re interested in canvassing, phone banking, or just want more
information, reply to this email and let me know what you’d like to do.
I’ll follow up with the next steps.

Thank you for taking the time to read this and for being part of a growing
movement focused on showing up for our community.
Sincerely,

Adam Shaikh

Field Lead
[image: image.png]

Zeeshan For Texas

P.O. Box 630732

Irving, Texas 75063

Direct: (813) 528-2984

https://www.zeeshanfortexas.com/en

name: Theresa Flores
subject: Peter, I was trafficked at 15
body:
Your kindness can equal a child saved.
I survived child trafficking. Many children don't--unless someone acts.

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a0c9ff092a3b4203806b36b5deedc3b8&_e=l2hF2IsHlgbNaNp5Uq0ZoG2ER0ppX6m-tQ_sIw3K3raD8E6dAfyuhLU-4DtkXeaDbUBU2aWT26Y1iCjCtnnGCLTN5s3_BUriANF5wVB64_cbTWBGXH9Q33hp5QLnmnqBEHgTgnCUUycni1M65tVNgocfbycEHJAt0CgFRAgcrj1J1i5Ph71qU-TvYlU0cGI8NMJgXe-12kdmElC3cUg-ebKCeUTkTPT5h1OrydZqh41TOc-PCmXoo0sSFt1rHvzmVGhd7Yp0tW0H4HmCVNFMvHMjED6iU7YqT8-85yx-YMIypVkRzZwLSFVlzJg4hL9wRn7u9GT0zX2fCYkOvOlCy9LCjmKSR_ssFXSmwbQqgwj8aofd8uNehmw0d9VFE31tsTty9zEtR6u9ZletmJCsG3thOoK4LB6XC1F0Oi3uzSGsfCPpBEcIZrAfixdPXSK5g-3cw3-bwQ-JbAEfszHzhxYr6FemLv01Y8EVesKvmRVxLDstQNq05MlruQ7N814RLinKVJF4zgQRJiE47tx9Wwe1pPRu7SnuExO0DdIeCphAKi999F8YXUw6pqYreHO0KRs9tw4NX2JuEyvc5z68d-1OLIyu-0chcnFAPP2jWRM2PhKFrn9lraPdIBXRGTklhQMulLdXx86iCRFLHQKYTDW0FVlvVtRjR1UHFgxOF5KmYcoaskcWBGNNIb3CD_JU-0UAaAaEWRL7AcCl80sNjuHYT0rhQp307XQqZodMVaQ%3D)
---
| |
---
| GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | Peter,

I am a survivor of child trafficking--and today, I work to make sure other children never face what I did. My name is Theresa Flores. **I was fifteen years old.****An honor student.
****A daughter.
****A girl who trusted the wrong "friend. "**I was trafficked for two years.Most people imagine trafficking happens far away - in dark alleys or foreign countries. **To "other people."**But my nightmare happened in the suburbs of Detroit.I lived at home.
I went to high school.
**And no one noticed.** On the worst night of my life, I was taken to a dirty motel room and auctioned off to nearly two dozen men.**I remember the smell of the room.
****The fear in my chest.
****And the silence I was forced to keep.** I survived.But many do not.
---
[ Help Save a Child](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a0c9ff092a3b4203806b36b5deedc3b8&_e=l2hF2IsHlgbNaNp5Uq0ZoG2ER0ppX6m-tQ_sIw3K3raD8E6dAfyuhLU-4DtkXeaDbUBU2aWT26Y1iCjCtnnGCLTN5s3_BUriANF5wVB64_cbTWBGXH9Q33hp5QLnmnqBEHgTgnCUUycni1M65tVNgocfbycEHJAt0CgFRAgcrj1J1i5Ph71qU-TvYlU0cGI8NMJgXe-12kdmElC3cUg-ebKCeUTkTPT5h1OrydZqh41TOc-PCmXoo0sSFt1rHvzm2TgCvvIwXbGWUpMhSrwXj7EsdLxDq82GLKAp9oYut4ahIk1rT_s9kW8P_ObWMZu69BbYzwcmAdrOL_kiilJtnRs3-hK2AbEn-p06o0DthApguyF42S5STvSP13OA9ta64bJGGImpm7N7KFWJNebouCAPM0TDDRuttLVYSbnPEowVjfV4Qpd9Wye7IsDquZnscSc3gcG02PZCJxhgH8Oz_0CLZR2blFteG9qZ_7QM4fJetc27swYqT7JBgNVVMLJdvINNnXZ1yuyhxwUByd8JoQLEvKABk7Puh2-CTg1sI6yB1zXq-JuEzRyIiJgaUmb9DI3Qi0c9OpSymtlkx08NgvzFxFvKjliryGpWoEUugzC2iFEu0oKtptjqEnV0kIDXhVgc05EbTHv8-UoZVQzdrUX99U8yHoMEe5bsxXdx0picZdEo50T4S594yp8xiwSNEiGneL4sKOTcOdC77oXpsMZYHmcqGTJelT8c_at_R4M%3D)
---
That's why I partner with the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** Through education and intervention, they equip frontline partners to do what most systems never taught--_help ordinary people to recognize trafficking before it 's too late._ Partners supported by **Sound of Freedom Foundation** train hotel employees--men and women working in places like the motel I was taken to -- to see what they were never taught to look for.**To notice what others miss.
****And to report it.** This is how **prevention becomes possible**. Because one informed employee and one brave phone call can save a life.**Here's the truth most people don 't know.**The majority of trafficking in America happens in hotels and motels.And it spikes around large sports events, conventions and concerts - anywhere demand increases. **There 's more you should know. **
---
* Human trafficking is the second-largest criminal enterprise in the world.
* **In the United States alone, 9 out of 10 missing children are trafficked.**
* If a child is not found within 48 hours, the risk of trafficking skyrockets.
* The average age of a trafficked child is 12 to 14 years old.

---

**Sound of Freedom Foundation** partners don't stop at rescue.They help care for survivors too.Across the country, partners host healing events and wellness weekends--safe places where survivors can rest, connect, and begin again. Survivors are offered opportunities to learn self-defense, engage in therapeutic art and movement, and build practical life skills.Sessions help survivors learn forgiveness, rebuild trust, form healthy relationships, and set strong boundaries.**How we care for survivors matters just as much as rescuing them.** You are hearing from me today because the **Sound of Freedom Foundation **helps make this work possible.And because children are worth fighting for.I want you to know this:**Your support is not abstract.
****It reaches motel rooms and f****rightened children - in moments****when seconds matter.** It reaches places I once stood-- without help.**Today, by the grace of God, I am a survivor.** An advocate.And the author so others can recognize the signs sooner.**But my story is not the point.

clean_body: Your kindness can equal a child saved. I survived child trafficking. Many children don't--unless someone acts. | | | | | | GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE | | | Peter, I am a survivor of child trafficking--and today, I work to make sure other children never face what I did. My name is Theresa Flores. I was fifteen years old.An honor student. A daughter. A girl who trusted the wrong "friend. "I was trafficked for two years.Most people imagine trafficking happens far away - in dark alleys or foreign countries. To "other people."But my nightmare happened in the suburbs of Detroit.I lived at home. I went to high school. And no one noticed. On the worst night of my life, I was taken to a dirty motel room and auctioned off to nearly two dozen men.I remember the smell of the room. The fear in my chest. And the silence I was forced to keep. I survived.But many do not. That's why I partner with the Sound of Freedom Foundation. Through education and intervention, they equip frontline partners to do what most systems never taught--help ordinary people to recognize trafficking before it 's too late. Partners supported by Sound of Freedom Foundation train hotel employees--men and women working in places like the motel I was taken to -- to see what they were never taught to look for.To notice what others miss. And to report it. This is how prevention becomes possible. Because one informed employee and one brave phone call can save a life.Here's the truth most people don 't know.The majority of trafficking in America happens in hotels and motels.And it spikes around large sports events, conventions and concerts - anywhere demand increases. There 's more you should know. Human trafficking is the second-largest criminal enterprise in the world. In the United States alone, 9 out of 10 missing children are trafficked. If a child is not found within 48 hours, the risk of trafficking skyrockets. The average age of a trafficked child is 12 to 14 years old. These are children. Not criminals. Not "prostitutes."Children. I ask you urgently - please pray they'll be found. Sound of Freedom Foundation partners don't stop at rescue.They help care for survivors too.Across the country, partners host healing events and wellness weekends--safe places where survivors can rest, connect, and begin again. Survivors are offered opportunities to learn self-defense, engage in therapeutic art and movement, and build practical life skills.Sessions help survivors learn forgiveness, rebuild trust, form healthy relationships, and set strong boundaries.How we care for survivors matters just as much as rescuing them. You are hearing from me today because the Sound of Freedom Foundation helps make this work possible.And because children are worth fighting for.I want you to know this:Your support is not abstract. It reaches motel rooms and frightened children - in momentswhen seconds matter. It reaches places I once stood-- without help.Today, by the grace of God, I am a survivor. An advocate.And the author so others can recognize the signs sooner.But my story is not the point. The children who are still trapped are. Every outreach is a race against time. Every trained volunteer is a shield.And YOU can be part of the rescue.Whether you give once or stand with the Sound of Freedom Foundation through steady, monthly support - your generosity saves lives - quietly, consistently and courageously. YOU can help save children from harm.We would be deeply grateful.THANK YOU. You are helping rewrite endings. You are helping children believe freedom is possible. For God's Children, Theresa Flores Freedom Fighter For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

Peter, I can't tell you how grateful I am for this team. Your support in January was absolutely essential to our work building a movement that can take on James Uthmeier and restore integrity to the Attorney General's office — and I know that I can count on you to hang in this fight with me as long as it takes. I ask so much of you, Peter. I want you to know that I'm on YOUR team, too. The first responsibility of any elected official is to represent the interests of the people. That means listening to what you and your communities need — from cracking down on corruption in Tallahassee to fighting the skyrocketing insurance rates and utility bills crushing Florida families. Whatever you're concerned about, hope for, or want to share with me: I want to hear about it. It's critical to me to know what priorities our supporters want to see addressed when I'm Attorney General. **[So please, start off February by filling out our Feb. 2026 Priorities Survey (it should only take a minute or two of your time) — I can't wait to hear from you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124486128/598776690/-1455086650?refcode=em_JJR_FR_TYSurvey_020126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVkMGY3NGYtNzZmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AgUlKbOXIw6GdJkZIdFmP-cf_QGTzp-WLnk7Hz8t0TU=&emci=843617d6-32fe-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=9ed0f74f-76ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=32374386)** | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124486132/598776697/-1455086650?refcode=em_JJR_FR_TYSurvey_020126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWVkMGY3NGYtNzZmZi1mMDExLTgzMmYtMDAwZDNhMWYwZTRjIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AgUlKbOXIw6GdJkZIdFmP-cf_QGTzp-WLnk7Hz8t0TU=&emci=843617d6-32fe-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=9ed0f74f-76ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=32374386) **

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: This is what gave Charlie strength
body:
A radical act of trust...| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d09e2991f4824cb28586a2ad1430e778&_e=v0GXatjYoDQKrX8SxlEL4OXIdQGQsRyTnCtg93ELcDvBvw2PPKaDrhy-tJ04Adg8jwZ6-rDVfVbphXYxFkXkXYp90PHdANXVOuZUUU7hDJ3IlNpnQZxjsytmVOSDh-CUhl1lAsI06vlKw1cKq-9A-QtMjJkcf-lPOymQ98ENYUwRkp-Kk3HOE7eza0gAYWGxzBy42y8678iXKB777ZxjlnbwMn2sayRACQKTtwQxjRXZBQ2-w3Wl-AiigW5MbC8Hq8a_BD_dSaHiD18bb1cDQnWubYBs8fGLvvsbOaSmYOaau6-5e0RrrCt8eBb1eFNjMpZy2GLmpSQIbiNmJfRJXJjLOybmEy0d6WNtQMEUcNkQsm7KVaCCxxUHrm8XXBNpj0cXBl03rospgyAIRo0_TITouVZ1xSGy1F3f2vSQIZEXiAQ-02vT0VBwxsOZiJFX8Bb0tP5T91OM_CNCGWsdH0fYbb-9ZMC_DxqWK_qV-ksR2ksJ68AnCLLH2rdxTQDtn7CedPr0lyngy9u6zAgYihxrwXid0pEFD_4yPJ4SyzBqcK07LI2OuiUxqBryAK4u-PZH7XXB8xc7Rt1Vetp9eilqStcLqKJTskgJZFRZmo80PLVMiHzvEVZz926FqY-xUeBcOkGVxh289EE-8vKSgWzI_dgJPWO_4Eld6paFW6ZOv4au-gtT_N_NSO-Cnfzy)
---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d09e2991f4824cb28586a2ad1430e778&_e=v0GXatjYoDQKrX8SxlEL4OXIdQGQsRyTnCtg93ELcDvBvw2PPKaDrhy-tJ04Adg8jwZ6-rDVfVbphXYxFkXkXYp90PHdANXVOuZUUU7hDJ3IlNpnQZxjsytmVOSDh-CUhl1lAsI06vlKw1cKq-9A-QtMjJkcf-lPOymQ98ENYUwRkp-Kk3HOE7eza0gAYWGxzBy42y8678iXKB777ZxjlnbwMn2sayRACQKTtwQxjRXjZplY1cVDQ-N4V4109dsOK0hCcvOlugAKMJ83bMl-dxQjuoGA596Gq2H3ck6-kkcNpCEmUNV0pSogX55SYgvnCifDDJeIXMMwKrdxEkYtG8eAXvVaIqhFYLf6c7RfyditQo3qA-e_mZPIkPyPeQfqq_BQrz07XTImyzYST47KMshEaKdL3j-XQBSAGi_3OS7qqQt_KRgRZPOn-JpL5nL4GqRVysjM7flwkanpzCb86C_MX0rEptC2jzWqbleSnShsI6vpCPpMlUjr3f2MMHeFl2Zn8bZOT_Chy-25_pFAsoKtjpBxESLZ7MqmFgbw_lAAHEfgOTE5pEZWINQratiVFqV5co4Yk2lYMnz9wv68coOToxffAxPXul6a2iby76ZTIE_pHqoCYgDNcrL-Gk366YjNyPPP68TkT6Xte_xvI5YmjLGYKy38zAarh1fjinCaySPw_qTfmcFHaSeZhEb3)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Stories from Minnesota
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, these are
accounts from Minnesota in the days since the murder of Renee Good. Please
read on.

ICE agents at a Target in Richfield, Minnesota grabbed a teenage employee
who was heckling them — as is your legal right — and threw him to the
ground. They shoved him in a van and drove away.

The boy was an American citizen who was yelling that he had his passport
in his pocket. They didn’t listen until he was detained. Since they had no
authority to arrest him, agents dumped him in a Walmart parking lot down
the road with no way to get home. He was found injured, bleeding, and
crying for help. A child.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]Photo of ICE attacking an underage American citizen at a Target in
Minnesota.

Christian Molina, a Latino man and US citizen, was driving to work in
South Minneapolis when ICE agents crashed into his car to force him to
stop. Why? Because he looked “illegal.” Christian refused to cooperate
with the illegal stop. When neighbors came to the scene to observe and
support, ICE tear gassed the crowd and left.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]Photo of Christian Molina's car damaged by ICE.Christian Molina’s car
after ICE rammed into him.

At a gas station in St. Paul, a man was practicing his legal right to film
and observe ICE activities when an ICE agent randomly grabbed him. More
agents came over and violently threw him to the ground, arrested him, and
dragged him away to an unmarked van. Arrested for exercising his First
Amendment rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]Photo of a man being attacked and arrested by ICE.

At an electric car charging station in Minneapolis, ICE agents went car to
car looking for people of color, asking each to prove they were citizens
or risk being dragged away.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]Photo of ICE agents asking a driver for proof of citizenship.

At a protest in Minneapolis, multiple masked ICE agents detained a
protester and US citizen by grabbing her by the throat and choking her.
She was thrown into an unmarked van and disappeared.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]Photo of a young woman being choked by ICE.

In Richfield, ICE swarmed the car of a US citizen with guns drawn, forced
him out, and made him get on his knees, an unlawful detention under the
Fourth Amendment. After he confirmed his citizenship, they had no choice
but to let him go.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]Photo of ICE agents with guns drawn surrounding a man on his knees.

In Minneapolis, ICE approached a U.S. citizen and community volunteer,
shattered his car window, dragged him out, and threw him to the ground. As
they arrested him, they put a knee on his neck: an illegal maneuver that
caused the death of George Floyd in 2020.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]Photo of ICE agents kneeling on a man's neck.

If you can believe it, I could keep going. There are hundreds if not
thousands of incidents like these in just the last two weeks. Folks
outside of Minnesota may not understand the scale and severity of the
chaos that ICE has unleashed.

Every day, ICE is harassing, beating, arresting, and violating the civil
rights of US citizens and immigrants alike.

If Trump can sic this fascist violence on Minnesota, he can do it
anywhere, on any of his political opponents and those who choose to stand
up for their communities.

We’ve talked about Trump’s many violations of the Constitution, but what
is happening in Minnesota right now is a dire Constitutional crisis: an
all-out assault on the rule of law and civil rights by out-of-control
government thugs that face zero accountability. We’ve seen this story play
out before in Germany, Italy, and fascist states throughout history. It
can’t happen again.

I’m calling on progressives across the country to stand with Minnesota and
help us fight back against ICE’s crackdowns. We cannot let them get away
with terrorizing our neighbors and beating people in the streets.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1009&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]If you can, consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and
Justice Democrats to support our movement today. Donating may seem like a
small act and simple, but it makes a world of difference as we build the
resources we need to defeat MAGA and the far-right extremists in the White
House.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260201-io.BVTBNj&refcode=em20260201-37395&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1028&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C ]Contribute $5

It’s important for me to share these stories with you, so that Americans
understand the violence and chaos being unleashed by their own president.

It’s unacceptable, and we must fight back for the sake of our democracy.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260201-37395-footer&t=1029&refcode2=37395_1203867_K4292C&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1030&akid=37395%2E1203867%2EK4292C

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: Peter, President Trump wants to abolish President Trump wants to abolish DST and make Standard Time permanent so that there is more daylight in the morning. Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time. How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard. Abolish DST \- Make DST Permanent \- No Change \- More daylight in the morning year-round for our circadian rhythm, more daylight in the evening year-round for recreational activities, or no change? President Trump has already revealed his plans, so now it's your turn to share your thoughts and represent your area. body:
You want Trump to be held accountable, right?
| **_BREAKING:_ Democratic Senator calls for Trump to be removed under 25th Amendment** This is exactly the kind of momentum we need! But we’re lacking critical support in your state — **your signature is one of the LAST that we still need!**

If we don’t demonstrate a SURGE of grassroots support, Trump will think the American people APPROVE of his dangerous agenda.

[**Please, add your name by our extended midnight deadline to DEMAND Trump be removed from office »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?refcode=VPP_20260201_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=6&akid=22810%2E878179%2E3zhlC_) | [ADD MY NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?refcode=VPP_20260201_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22810%2E878179%2E3zhlC_)
---
_The Voter Protection Project_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
_**We couldn’t agree more:**_

**“Trump’s insane new threat leaves no doubt: it’s time to invoke the 25th Amendment.”**
_—The Daily Beast_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?refcode=VPP_20260201_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22810%2E878179%2E3zhlC_)
[**With momentum on our side we need to act now: Should the 25th amendment be revoked to REMOVE Donald Trump from office?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?refcode=VPP_20260201_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=9&akid=22810%2E878179%2E3zhlC_)
[YES, ADD MY NAME: DEMAND THE 25TH AMENDMENT BE INVOKED TO REMOVE TRUMP FROM THE WHITE HOUSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?refcode=VPP_20260201_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22810%2E878179%2E3zhlC_)
---
* * *
**Donald Trump is ramping up his abuse of power:**

❌ Using force against American cities.
❌ Threatening to ARREST and EXECUTE Democrats who stand up to him.
❌ Claiming the American people _“need a king.”_

[**We need to act FAST before our democracy is DESTROYED! Will you join 5,999 local Democrats in demanding the 25th Amendment be invoked to REMOVE Trump from the White House?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?refcode=VPP_20260201_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22810%2E878179%2E3zhlC_)

The Voter Protection Project
878179
