name: Gina Hinojosa HQ
subject: Taylor Rehmet just flipped a red seat in Fort Worth
body:
This is only the beginning.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
**Texas by the numbers this morning:**
* **Democrats flipped a seat Trump won by 17 points.**
* **The district hasn’t elected a Democrat in 30+ years.**
* **The Democrat was outspent by the Republican 10-1.**

**Change is coming to Texas, and it just started in Tarrant County.**
Yesterday, Texas voters just defied the odds and flipped a deep-red, gerrymandered district blue. These results show that Texans are ready for something different.
With this win, union leader and veteran Taylor Rehmet proved what we’ve been saying this entire time — **Texans are done with Greg Abbott and his poor leadership.**
This district has been Republican for years. But when given a real choice, voters picked a candidate who shows up, listens, and fights for working people.
This is only the beginning, Peter.
**[If you’re ready to give Greg Abbott the boot and elect Gina as Texas’s next Governor, chip in $5 to fuel this campaign.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260201_1_fw.9bfPO6&refcode=em20260201-510&amount=5&t=1&akid=510%2E299639%2E_Sqy3A)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260201_1_fw.9bfPO6&amount=5&refcode=em20260201-510&t=2&akid=510%2E299639%2E_Sqy3A)
The reality is that it’s not about party labels. It’s about trust. And it’s exactly why Gina’s campaign is gaining momentum across the state.
**Texans are _sick_ of Abbott putting billionaires first.** They want leaders who will fight for good schools, lower costs, and an economy that works for working families, not the well-connected and wealthy.
Gina is running because she believes Texas deserves better. And what we’re seeing right now, even in places Republicans thought were out of reach, is proof that voters agree.
Abbott and his donors are already preparing to pour millions into stopping this movement, and we need to be ready to meet them head-on.
**[If you’re fired up by this win and ready to help elect Gina for Governor, please consider chipping in $5 to help us keep the momentum going.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260201_1_fw.9bfPO6&refcode=em20260201-510&amount=5&t=3&akid=510%2E299639%2E_Sqy3A)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260201_1_fw.9bfPO6&amount=5&refcode=em20260201-510&t=22&akid=510%2E299639%2E_Sqy3A)
Thank you,
Team Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260201-1&t=23&refcode2=510_299639__Sqy3A&akid=510%2E299639%2E_Sqy3A)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=24&akid=510%2E299639%2E_Sqy3A)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=25&akid=510%2E299639%2E_Sqy3A)

name: Kevin Ford Jr for State Senate
subject: Black History Month: Honoring Our Legacy, Fighting for Our Future
body:
Today marks the beginning of Black History Month—a time not just to reflect on where we’ve been, but to be clear about where we’re going. | | | [](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=697f87f2d7519659f3a4a95a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fvotekevinfordjr.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6975db771783096847846190%26ss_email_id%3D697f87f2d7519659f3a4a95a%26ss_campaign_name%3DBlack%2BHistory%2BMonth%253A%2BHonoring%2BOur%2BLegacy%252C%2BFighting%2Bfor%2BOur%2BFuture%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2026-02-01T17%253A07%253A31Z&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_6975db771783096847846190&l=en-US&s=CQ6jM98TUduLhVXX4lvKv2zD0H8%3D)
---
|
#### **Black History Month: Honoring Our Legacy, Fighting for Our Future**
Today marks the beginning of **Black History Month** —and this year, we commemorate its **100th anniversary**.For a century, Black History Month has been a deliberate act of preservation and resistance. It began as a reminder that our stories matter, that our contributions could not be erased, and that progress only happens when people are willing to organize, lead, and demand better for the next generation.Black history is a story of strength, sacrifice, and responsibility. It’s about people who built institutions when none existed for them, who fought for dignity and opportunity, and who believed deeply that their children deserved more than what they were given. That legacy lives on in our families, our communities, and in the choices we make right now.[**I’m running because I believe that legacy demands action—not symbolism. It demands leaders who understand that strong families are the foundation of strong communities, that opportunity should not depend on zip code, and that government should work for people who have too often been asked to wait their turn.**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=697f87f2d7519659f3a4a95a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfj4md.com%2Fendorse&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_6975db771783096847846190&l=en-US&s=xXQF-SoFCvMNFF4K3G2AuDjv-iU%3D) Progress has never been handed to us. It has been earned through leadership, persistence, and courage. My commitment is to honor this history by doing the work today—listening, showing up, and advancing policies that help families thrive and open doors for the next generation.[**Stand with me as we fight for the future our families deserve.**](https://z6h1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=697f87f2d7519659f3a4a95a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfj4md.com%2Fendorse&w=67e59626f08d7b1924bf5048&c=b_6975db771783096847846190&l=en-US&s=xXQF-SoFCvMNFF4K3G2AuDjv-iU%3D) In service,

Kevin Ford, Jr. for State Senate
Maryland’s 24th Legislative District

clean_body: Today marks the beginning of Black History Month—a time not just to reflect on where we’ve been, but to be clear about where we’re going. | | | | Black History Month: Honoring Our Legacy, Fighting for Our Future Today marks the beginning of Black History Month —and this year, we commemorate its 100th anniversary.For a century, Black History Month has been a deliberate act of preservation and resistance. It began as a reminder that our stories matter, that our contributions could not be erased, and that progress only happens when people are willing to organize, lead, and demand better for the next generation.Black history is a story of strength, sacrifice, and responsibility. It’s about people who built institutions when none existed for them, who fought for dignity and opportunity, and who believed deeply that their children deserved more than what they were given. That legacy lives on in our families, our communities, and in the choices we make right now. Progress has never been handed to us. It has been earned through leadership, persistence, and courage. My commitment is to honor this history by doing the work today—listening, showing up, and advancing policies that help families thrive and open doors for the next generation. In service, Kevin Ford, Jr. for State Senate Maryland’s 24th Legislative District | | | ---|---|--- | I’M ASKING FOR YOUR SUPPORT I want you to know this campaign isn’t just political—it’s personal. I’m a proud son of Prince George’s County, a lifelong Marylander, and a tireless advocate for families. That’s why I’m running for State Senate to make sure our government works for all Prince Georgians. | | | | | | mailto:info@kfordjr.com ---|---|---|---|--- By Authority: Friends of Kevin Ford, Jr., Anton Shoetan, Treasurer 7003 Glenn Dale Road #84, Glenn Dale, MD 20769, United States

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: You’re the reason our movement works
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260201-1887-foote&t=1001&akid=1887%2E342411%2ESIKfEz ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

When we talk about people-powered politics, we mean it — and you’re the
reason it works.

Your continued
support isn’t just a gift. It’s how the Squad can keep
protecting our communities, challenging corporate interests, and pushing
for the bold, progressive change our country desperately needs.

Because of your support, Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida can
continue speaking truth to power, taking on Trump and MAGA Republicans,
and refusing to back down from the fights that matter most — from
defending healthcare and workers’ rights to protecting our democracy and
holding billionaires accountable.

This movement is powered by people like you — people who refuse to settle
for the status quo and demand a government that works for everyone. And
thanks to you, we’re only getting started.

Thank you for being part of this fight and for standing with the Squad
every step of the way.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

The Squad is on the front lines, pushing back against Trump and MAGA
Republicans’ attacks on our democracy — and they can’t do it alone.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

| | | | | | | Dear Patriot,
I hope this email finds you well. I'm reaching out to you today with an urgent message regarding our **_[high-quality ankle holsters](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22383/6374453/1bdd26a00b03a1e80ff60f0018bdf1d4f2d75032/b32b213e75820a2932c0bc30cdedd24c604883c7)_**. It's imperative that you take immediate action as our supplies are running dangerously low, and this is an opportunity you won't want to miss!
Ankle holsters have become a must-have accessory for individuals seeking optimal comfort, convenience, and accessibility when carrying concealed firearms. Whether you're an on-duty law enforcement officer, a responsible civilian, or simply a gun enthusiast, our ankle holsters provide the perfect solution for discreet and secure firearm storage.
Here's why you need to act swiftly:
* Limited Stock: Due to overwhelming demand and the exceptional quality of our ankle holsters, our inventory is rapidly depleting. If you delay your purchase, there's a real risk of missing out on this exceptional product.
* Unmatched Quality: Our ankle holsters are meticulously crafted using premium materials to ensure durability and reliability. Don't settle for subpar alternatives when you can experience the unparalleled comfort and peace of mind that our holsters offer.
* Secure Concealment: With our ankle holsters, you can confidently carry your firearm without compromising on comfort or accessibility. The design allows for discreet concealment, ensuring that you have quick and easy access to your weapon when you need it most.
* Versatile Use: Whether you're engaged in everyday activities, outdoor adventures, or professional duties, our ankle holsters provide a versatile carrying solution. You can count on them to **_[securely hold your firearm](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22383/6374453/1bdd26a00b03a1e80ff60f0018bdf1d4f2d75032/b32b213e75820a2932c0bc30cdedd24c604883c7)_** , even in the most demanding situations.

Remember, time is of the essence! Act now to secure your very own ankle holster before we run out of stock completely. By purchasing today, you'll guarantee yourself the peace of mind and confidence that only our top-of-the-line product can provide.
To **_[order your ankle holster](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22383/6374453/1bdd26a00b03a1e80ff60f0018bdf1d4f2d75032/b32b213e75820a2932c0bc30cdedd24c604883c7)_** , simply visit the website. Our team is ready to assist you in selecting the perfect holster to meet your needs.
Thank you for your attention, and we look forward to serving you soon.
Best regards,
Gunner Gear

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I'm angry, too.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4657?refcode=jtk242-fr-nd&t=1&akid=7183%2E400544%2EAVk7lY)
---
Friend, my heart is heavy.

Last weekend, while Minnesotans and many across the country stood against the disgusting and terrifying violence ICE is carrying out in our country, federal agents shot and killed another person. He was not the first person unjustly killed by ICE, and most likely, he will not be the last, and I know that’s why so many people are angry. I’m angry too.

I don't have the words to express my horror at what is happening in our country right now, but I do know that we must continue to fight back — in any way we can. Resistance can be organizing a protest, delivering coffee and providing a warm place for protestors, or calling your lawmakers or running for local office. Hope is only lost when resistance stops, and there is power in our voices and collective action.
**New Mexicans are not strangers to adversity. In fact, we are strong and support each other. To New Mexicans who are living in fear, worrying about loved ones, and watching what is happening in our communities with horror, I want you to know I stand with you in this fight — I always have and I always will. Today, as your neighbor and friend. Next year, as your governor.
**
While state and local law enforcement work hard to protect our communities, under-trained ICE agents are using violence, rounding people up, tearing families apart, targeting Black and brown communities, and breaking the law. And now, Americans are being killed in the streets for standing up, speaking out, and opposing them.
**This is unacceptable. Our communities are _less safe_ as a direct result of Donald Trump's policies. It's un-American, and it must stop.**
If Donald Trump and ICE want to bring the violence and unrest to New Mexico, they will have to get through my administration and me. We will have zero tolerance for their injustice, and we will use every authority at our disposal to stop them.
I will do everything in my power to protect our public spaces — like schools, churches, courthouses, healthcare centers, and state government facilities.
I will support efforts to require ICE agents to identify themselves and remove their masks and to ban ICE detention centers in our state.
Governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its resources and undermines civil liberties. Our responsibility is to protect families, safeguard our communities, and make sure no one lives in fear. You have my promise: I will hold Donald Trump accountable and protect New Mexicans. Always.
This isn't over. I expect it will get harder before it gets easier. But together, we will defend our rights and liberties.
With you in this fight,

Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4657?refcode=jtk242-fr-nd&t=2&akid=7183%2E400544%2EAVk7lY)
---

This isn't over. I expect it will get harder before it gets easier. But together, we will defend our rights and liberties. With you in this fight, Deb | | | | |

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260201-61137&t=1001&akid=61137%2E1407376%2EQ20DSc ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260201-61137&t=1002&akid=61137%2E1407376%2EQ20DSc ]Demand Justice PAC

Donald Trump is moving fast to lock in control of our courts for
generations to come.

He’s stacking the bench with loyalists who answer to him and him alone.
Judges who will rubber-stamp billionaire power, gut workers’ rights, and
roll back our freedoms without blinking.

These are lifetime appointments.
And once they’re confirmed, the damage doesn’t expire.

That’s why Demand Justice PAC is going on offense.

We’re not whispering our objections. We’re forcing a reckoning. When
politicians help Trump rig the courts — no matter their party — we make
sure there’s a real political cost. Pressure comes early, it comes
publicly, and it doesn’t let up.

We’re also tearing down the lie that these nominees are “neutral.” Trump’s
judicial picks are engineered to do exactly what he wants: lock in his
agenda, protect the wealthy and well-connected, and put basic rights out
of reach for millions.

And we turn outrage into action. The courts decide who has rights and who
doesn’t — abortion access, healthcare, voting rights, worker protections.
Your support fuels nationwide organizing and pressure to stop extreme
nominees.

hold politicians accountable, expose judicial corruption, and help take
back our courts.

clean_body: [ ]Demand Justice PAC[ ]Demand Justice PAC Donald Trump is moving fast to lock in control of our courts for generations to come. He’s stacking the bench with loyalists who answer to him and him alone. Judges who will rubber-stamp billionaire power, gut workers’ rights, and roll back our freedoms without blinking. These are lifetime appointments. And once they’re confirmed, the damage doesn’t expire. That’s why Demand Justice PAC is going on offense. We’re not whispering our objections. We’re forcing a reckoning. When politicians help Trump rig the courts — no matter their party — we make sure there’s a real political cost. Pressure comes early, it comes publicly, and it doesn’t let up. We’re also tearing down the lie that these nominees are “neutral.” Trump’s judicial picks are engineered to do exactly what he wants: lock in his agenda, protect the wealthy and well-connected, and put basic rights out of reach for millions. And we turn outrage into action. The courts decide who has rights and who doesn’t — abortion access, healthcare, voting rights, worker protections. Your support fuels nationwide organizing and pressure to stop extreme nominees. [ ]If you’re ready to fight back, chip in $5 right now to hold politicians accountable, expose judicial corruption, and help take back our courts. [ ]Donate $5 ›› Thank you, Team Demand Justice PAC

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The message Charlie carried into eternity
body:
Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics — it was about peace| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=747c697addbf43908750fb5b797f6bc9&_e=yCJOFQanBMF1RJwh_grth8aCRO4m6JFRkl4vCgr0MZ8I3Xg-ip91RoEamavnVBHife19RM2YcZSDz-FfU-9fz3OcLyV2SeeENpiiQu4juqjGJsHD7D6KD6HXUUifAOqzv0k2Kd9ESM5fesULop1rGCWM1LKjSxEh9Dtxo6kbc5h8hjPv1jwlGRmAPrarqfYuR8n9iDAIU3aafyGgDq_Qos5XvUO0t-3VlKoxoZwN3idBHIJc03huAXlGX0efc3PoJPLzbhUpt7vNz1cdaq5vt6iGBmGeBiKNmH11fFSwE7635wG5w1JsvwomIpwjUx6U52pY2CfoB7sVI37UxV_jI1gVJsjbaIU6XAXcjIBx374_hhz2yVJnngocIviNtgnQIh8bhRWBFXkJ6wTuviuIfCOPQ4AKKQTfRnZBC9wN8bLrCjnlGBbW2TVAMQD5PVk6EYXLrgFROyQcBz1G_OxQbaq_4Zdlg1yPHxE3o9nAeYB_SXU1bcBMRFCtL2K40VSvQM-872Qy3vgeyGfnNpUnFi3CQXtEEMRjijgZXMRA9Slj4y-yIqc2IeTcoELb7xo_2md1rwziQ4ijUScaIFlLxVsaAqKfIdbX5imcv9-bd6C0JPsxcPgQ7asMiNcJ2Vk7WvRDKYQ_JVtpcSokyLcwH__XTHaDUmHpOeS7rxd6hElTXIrdS9kIWntbEyBODBO7)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=747c697addbf43908750fb5b797f6bc9&_e=yCJOFQanBMF1RJwh_grth8aCRO4m6JFRkl4vCgr0MZ8I3Xg-ip91RoEamavnVBHife19RM2YcZSDz-FfU-9fz3OcLyV2SeeENpiiQu4juqjGJsHD7D6KD6HXUUifAOqzv0k2Kd9ESM5fesULop1rGCWM1LKjSxEh9Dtxo6kbc5h8hjPv1jwlGRmAPrarqfYuR8n9iDAIU3aafyGgDq_Qos5XvUO0t-3VlKoxoZwN3ielb9O3RVWX8gkLY14af2T9SKKg53GVyHzoYdARrQnn9rIA_BVzZUloUac5gJCUR3kmB2oOcJb0DvvdwfDMl8ZnmxveJMH-XolVx7OEIFDli48aqiah4RwK3s-95RVSFcTxlGgqrNOhFHSCACcnSF6-Ug3hnjObO1hn0T677axs_c93GVXehR95SWLj_zs-mRlWaIvNowNE_QJqQ-LUqfVm7oquBdaogBVwyXqF0X32y3298ItpwpR7AxJK7TbzV8MZ-0RWP84Xo1lfJU01-JBIa9ChTOQhIBhz9L5cCDPi0W1APjAi9Ae4r9L7ooCtub6h857EE4yoBqSule79jRsOj2wLjNSkc2aNSbsBxv0upVlmb-U4_DGWaTIUGgT8pM0zQApU8idcVylyZo-DyJTtOmdiyz6j18IldfkAYdke3zHeANf-8p3cujQNXhokRUem4hkgjDtc0iD85WDYRckV)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=747c697addbf43908750fb5b797f6bc9&_e=yCJOFQanBMF1RJwh_grth8aCRO4m6JFRkl4vCgr0MZ8I3Xg-ip91RoEamavnVBHife19RM2YcZSDz-FfU-9fz3OcLyV2SeeENpiiQu4juqjGJsHD7D6KD6HXUUifAOqzv0k2Kd9ESM5fesULop1rGCWM1LKjSxEh9Dtxo6kbc5h8hjPv1jwlGRmAPrarqfYuR8n9iDAIU3aafyGgDq_Qos5XvUO0t-3VlKoxoZwN3idT-dTKS4UMbTGJ_QWTx1F44qUCi5bK5PAUgISELr7SWo_TyosSJ14rGEoVwnpAuqpTt6GZFBKzWZxnwFTl_NqrRScK8_GKjIY8Fe_VCTsmQ223ZYh61zmXn7NHt_wDvhQA6YaZ2cfj5BlJ80s0yYATXiHIa0t1tWum1h2G84Y2wE6HC4S3ArKIf_QpbecI11PJ1JLGdDQTOHtJ390Fu-Uhm1Dtuo7AV6TsmcDSX_ELP5NPl6EqswJ9iLL8twyth5O07J8mzA9GgiqRY_nUGlQTKQXs02r6YXaI0QByv68yIh0Eq7IgC_S0LWu9NRFaPMArmjMYmfocyC9lCclKxDpNjrn77l2u_EKGWqV-xqYrEEQ0GLDp656RiPNp68FZk92ZtNOUe-DES2U3-_kGqlQ2MdmsoxAHHWO33SnOD6dLguH9RXu7PjMVNcu_tkKpz-ml6dTr0msUF1J51RoOEu0T)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie’s Final Book**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=747c697addbf43908750fb5b797f6bc9&_e=yCJOFQanBMF1RJwh_grth8aCRO4m6JFRkl4vCgr0MZ8I3Xg-ip91RoEamavnVBHife19RM2YcZSDz-FfU-9fz3OcLyV2SeeENpiiQu4juqjGJsHD7D6KD6HXUUifAOqzv0k2Kd9ESM5fesULop1rGCWM1LKjSxEh9Dtxo6kbc5h8hjPv1jwlGRmAPrarqfYuR8n9iDAIU3aafyGgDq_Qos5XvUO0t-3VlKoxoZwN3ievSHKwz3oGimnWxhm0mEb9USZm735PaqkWWfgAXO0sb-U-NgDX56VuLMCyaF-4EEjdt3CTn6MXYx4aFD7du5rFEt26fD7geZJ-QcvAfMb89JG63x6mVqdDL9Bl6p7eGTZlNfolMmFhLhC7DFpHrsSFyz3sGGLqQiZvMIUgnKsoNt6x_ccIZ4HgbnIS3B6n7YquDDBVA9r_mVtNE5b2M2cepGu054URLssFF86U3zHEybyNqTPpW_PmXNETjAie9b6VDcLXirLlGF0LButQOk1mmduM-Lyng-Vw4esEqQzB2onSpBJKVDKYkBwVhH8aij0JDothFySku66G3QROkMrc-3QBgqaNuf6RbzSxEhT2PWox9HmEHiZ1cbxpkkomj-V1cjrtzic1sGrdOLK7VFd0PknpXStbtG7okoOENTiF8JobeIYpWC9XUTUfOlxla7vLrWVkpiVe3STVQl4NLqwj)
---
In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

**[To claim your copy of Charlie’s final book, simply make a gift, in any amount, to support Turning Point USA today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=747c697addbf43908750fb5b797f6bc9&_e=yCJOFQanBMF1RJwh_grth8aCRO4m6JFRkl4vCgr0MZ8I3Xg-ip91RoEamavnVBHife19RM2YcZSDz-FfU-9fz3OcLyV2SeeENpiiQu4juqjGJsHD7D6KD6HXUUifAOqzv0k2Kd9ESM5fesULop1rGCWM1LKjSxEh9Dtxo6kbc5h8hjPv1jwlGRmAPrarqfYuR8n9iDAIU3aafyGgDq_Qos5XvUO0t-3VlKoxoZwN3id1UwdulZsn6yoP0DutXanlPNXezXzho76GRCWh4qYRqR_4bdBZJ9zagtiD1urhLAMneK9u0lW-IW2Na9jQQgbB7AJKm-FkmRQww4UiduFP_BnomXAs16Pzv-Dp_NzFmGc1U8Kp0PeaO7TY0SRpOwGQGF3q1o6tdzyLAU-WKIwkgJFNdOQTohLPXs0bVA2ihdstPH_e_aDizofucQULAsM0vO31venUeQvrb192YzttfD12nKhw1pu9Mcf34LqNqUb6pOxUWbdrZZvY3IqkomK1amWLampuG1TiA8lqDVwsQWgdnEW8iBY8nhGpOf3lrH4iGbu8EK6jTBGCIB3DwQpGMuwe3xdPkrX8OE6WgddrKVqrbi94aIz6uF7PgkPcudfaD0YfP8Ci5_aVoCg5TWCGvKoh7ThyIzP41aRRcBCAtcYUWzYv10k4YPbC7yBJUIf0MukkCRWNluj3ovnD0nWm)**

clean_body: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics — it was about peace| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I got my start in public service to advocate for kids like Ben
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
It’s my firm belief that all children should have the opportunity to learn.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124515842/598855136/-671935818?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.01_What-Education-Meant-For-Ben_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODBhZWFjNy05M2ZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S5GIPrsAqshotCGNejGdA1wnruPvI2oP1KNwYaNCHWs=) Folks, when I think about my son Ben, I can’t help but think about the educators who guided him as he grew up.

**Ben, who’s now 37, was born with cerebral palsy. It is in part because of a whole lot of dedicated educators — who were committed to helping him learn and thrive — that Ben is the wonderful person he is today.**

I got my start in public service to advocate for kids like Ben — and that mission brought me all the way to the U.S. Senate. It’s my firm belief that all children should have the opportunity to learn — regardless of their circumstance — but Donald Trump’s attacks on the Department of Education put students with disabilities at risk of and prevent them from getting the support they need in school.

Trump’s funding cuts have resulted in staffing shortages, freezes on education grants focused on helping educators teach students with disabilities, and countless other disruptions. The Republican attempts to dismantle our public education system are absolutely heartbreaking — and that’s why I’m not standing idly by.

Being Ben's mom has given me a particular perspective on the continued work we need to do to improve opportunities for people with disabilities. [**_I have been a fierce voice for folks with disabilities since day one — and I’ll keep advocating for vulnerable communities in the U.S. Senate. Will you please pitch in anything you can — $25, $5, or even $1 — to power my work and elect even more disability champions to the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124515843/598855137/-671935818?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.01_What-Education-Meant-For-Ben_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODBhZWFjNy05M2ZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S5GIPrsAqshotCGNejGdA1wnruPvI2oP1KNwYaNCHWs=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $1 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124515844/598855138/-671935818?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.01_What-Education-Meant-For-Ben_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODBhZWFjNy05M2ZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S5GIPrsAqshotCGNejGdA1wnruPvI2oP1KNwYaNCHWs=)

clean_body: It’s my firm belief that all children should have the opportunity to learn. = Folks, when I think about my son Ben, I can’t help but think about the educators who guided him as he grew up. Ben, who’s now 37, was born with cerebral palsy. It is in part because of a whole lot of dedicated educators — who were committed to helping him learn and thrive — that Ben is the wonderful person he is today. I got my start in public service to advocate for kids like Ben — and that mission brought me all the way to the U.S. Senate. It’s my firm belief that all children should have the opportunity to learn — regardless of their circumstance — but Donald Trump’s attacks on the Department of Education put students with disabilities at risk of and prevent them from getting the support they need in school. Trump’s funding cuts have resulted in staffing shortages, freezes on education grants focused on helping educators teach students with disabilities, and countless other disruptions. The Republican attempts to dismantle our public education system are absolutely heartbreaking — and that’s why I’m not standing idly by. Being Ben's mom has given me a particular perspective on the continued work we need to do to improve opportunities for people with disabilities. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = With every good wish, Maggie Hassan If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. **I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be.**
**But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy:**
**
* Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares
* Failing to condemn the activists storming churches
* Raising prices on hardworking families
* Sabotaging anything the President wants to do
* Forcing men into women's spaces
* Pitting Americans against each other

**
**I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate!

** Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. **
**But this year is going to be different for three key reasons:**
**FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. **
**SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. **
**THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said.**
**In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. **
**The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history.

clean_body: Folks – Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. - Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be. But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy: Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares Failing to condemn the activists storming churches Raising prices on hardworking families Sabotaging anything the President wants to do Forcing men into women's spaces Pitting Americans against each other I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate! thought long and hard about the dynamics of this race before jumping in. Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. But this year is going to be different for three key reasons: FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said. In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history. | | ---|--- Thanks in advance for your support. I'll never forget the good folks who stepped up in the opening days of this campaign. You and I are going to do great things together. I can feel it. Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele Tafoya Republican for Senate, Minnesota It's official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:** | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

Peter,

**If you thought the corruption in Minnesota was bad, what they’re finding in California is so much worse.**

Over the last five years, **California spent MILLIONS of federal taxpayer dollars paying phone and internet bills for nearly 94,000 deceased individuals** through the FCC’s Lifeline program.

That means YOUR MONEY was used to bankroll this scam.

[**And there's NO telling where these MILLIONS of YOUR dollars went!**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/qWh71d2HULavFz8suKVts5QVleYfeSmXXWz7gg5Kyryk6CdBYlbQHgmR0dmDBWBOsqp7hxPOAzzlA0Shy3bPbUlMFn20XwHFkYnIQjX_5dwJJcaZcS0eXvl1xe7EYAgrlTlGBMO6fcDVg7Q-iNqGyXsV48yV8w-Z9OtNYCbDjyLughd1gTHePtq-P3yUqg_G7JV4sJkr37VQarmszfcMtEb5pw5bNjwTjMVhHRLLVBcg83TJGUzoyUprOOVQFxuXJbTNGtJexq9C3esZO0ixkbW2vzBeXp46Zfx8YZAZPT22SvpNeGs3sscdKl-4-lK4LkyDRfaww5DXCEEaHAXM2pnpnKnRK-gnyUDBzvWRQqSEhdjrJgNKIa0fm_LscbC8tbQti1elFJ5GliQC9LKI1tVgDK5zoVSbFKIhth5F3Iz893oTG7i6LfrHF3ZyYcxbLbb9RNeQYyORivJ1zrP7y9JvE2EbPrz1bx7isc3PPZ-fhTH7LT2HSvA-0kQcR9G3W463Jk42s9YI3XPnBauZ5Sn1LVbLBO8eHLinv2nsoVEVyqE5gLozQYdZlE3lCuWBHFhw1d99ls5FvlX5iEqG9dgF0vmPn8DbD0_PanBgdnI-eWX8MAOQmPaQJLCV6Y42RXFcIjxCjipfLLeY5PwjbHt4zcMwcVXPqTGBDFDQ9QcDhcJ690FQ7VewWTOwA0RsYg9EcYuUnHStbIanx_2cHqTBIDX3Bg2OcIe5YR3HifDA7I3oPPlbro5xMy5wkvuQ2xv_29tlVUrfLS_0HN4JHCGAmbrrtURzi0HUxHUaA4pTdgYLxqkMhKB6W1d8VBwv1f5oSsFQHMBx14w/Kg80ReMfudi1EmW05z0sSJc-hytHpyxn/17)

And that’s not even the worst part, Peter.

**Almost twenty percent of the recipients passed BEFORE THEY WERE EVEN ENROLLED in the program.**

**And fifteen percent were CONFIRMED DECEASED before the benefits kicked in!**

According to the official report, California accounts for over 80% of the deceased individuals participating in Lifeline.

_“Gavin Newsom’s California was**by far** the worst offender...”_
_\- FCC Chairman Brendan Carr_

Over the last five years, California spent MILLIONS of federal taxpayer dollars paying phone and internet bills for nearly 94,000 deceased individuals through the FCC’s Lifeline program. That means YOUR MONEY was used to bankroll this scam. And that’s not even the worst part, Peter. Almost twenty percent of the recipients passed BEFORE THEY WERE EVEN ENROLLED in the program. And fifteen percent were CONFIRMED DECEASED before the benefits kicked in! According to the official report, California accounts for over 80% of the deceased individuals participating in Lifeline. “Gavin Newsom’s California wasby far the worst offender...” \- FCC Chairman Brendan Carr This wasn’t an accident, Peter. This was a massive government failure that allowed fraud to thrive while taxpayers like you were left footing the bill. And it all happened right under Gavin Newsom’s nose. That's why the California Republican Party is EXPOSING this corruption, DEMANDING answers, and HOLDING Gavin Newsom accountable for his failure at the highest level. But accountability only happens when patriots like you REFUSE to stay silent. That’s why we’re asking 250,000 real live Americans to send $1 RIGHT NOW to stand with the CAGOP and hold Gavin Newsom accountable for MISMANAGING MILLIONS in fraudulent payments! Donate $1 RIGHT NOW to defend YOUR TAXPAYER DOLLARS from failures like Gavin Newsom! \- Corrin Rankin Chair, California Republican Party P.S. #### NOTE: On Friday, January 30th, [we wrote an open letter stating clear opposition to the arrests of four journalists and activists](https://substack.com/redirect/12e9f1ea-fb31-4d9f-b52c-34274fdd8014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Minnesota on what were clearly illegal, partisan charges. Today we add a call to action to our outrage--five concrete demands that we expect every elected leader--especially every Democrat--to enact.
#### If you feel the danger and desperation of this moment, too, [please join us and add your name to this letter](https://substack.com/redirect/3e231023-c0e5-4e19-b2b7-7a9f8836db7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* * *
_**February 1, 2026**_
We write as journalists, publishers, creators, and citizens who believe that democracy requires more than elections--it requires the rule of law, equal justice, and an uncompromising commitment to the First Amendment.
That commitment is now under direct attack.
On January 30, federal authorities arrested four people in Minnesota: Georgia Fort, an independent journalist; Trahern Crews, a community organizer; Don Lemon, a media figure; and Jamael Lundy, a candidate for the Minnesota State Senate. Their alleged offense was entering a church to protest a pastor who collaborates with Immigration and Customs Enforcement.
This letter is not about personal preferences, reputations, or styles of journalism or activism. Reasonable people may disagree about tone, tactics, or presentation. None of that is relevant here. Nothing that occurred was unlawful, and everything that occurred--whether we would have done it differently or not--is protected by the First Amendment of the United States Constitution.
That is the bottom line. A free society does not condition press freedom or political speech on likability, restraint, or conformity. When a government arrests journalists, organizers, and political candidates for constitutionally protected activity, it is no longer enforcing the law--it is trampling it.
The context makes this even more alarming.
All four individuals are public figures engaged in journalism, political organizing, or electoral opposition. All four are Black. These arrests appear to have been carried out in defiance of existing court orders limiting federal enforcement actions in Minnesota. They occurred just one day after reporting revealed that Attorney General Pam Bondi pressured the Minnesota Secretary of State to surrender private voter data in exchange for ICE standing down--an act that would constitute coercion, voter intimidation, and a gross abuse of federal power.
Taken together, these actions are not isolated. They follow a pattern seen in authoritarian systems worldwide: criminalize dissent, target opposition figures, intimidate the press, and test how far the public and institutions will allow it to go.
This is a test of the First Amendment itself.
If journalists can be arrested for covering or participating in protest, candidates detained for organizing, and voters' private data treated as leverage, then constitutional rights exist only at the pleasure of those in power.
Accordingly, we make the following demands, grounded in constitutional law and democratic principle:
1. **The immediate dismissal of all charges against Georgia Fort, Trahern Crews, Don Lemon, and Jamael Lundy.**
There is no lawful or constitutional basis for these prosecutions.
2. **A full public accounting of who authorized these arrests and under what legal authority.**
Any federal officials or agents who violated court orders, civil rights, or state law must be investigated and held accountable.
3. **The immediate resignation of Attorney General Pam Bondi --or, failing that, the initiation of impeachment proceedings.**
An Attorney General who uses the machinery of the state to intimidate voters, pressure election officials, or suppress dissent cannot remain in office in a constitutional republic.
4. **An immediate halt to any federal effort to access, coerce, or weaponize state voter data.**
Voter rolls are not bargaining chips. Their misuse is election interference.
5. **Action by state attorneys general, district attorneys, governors, and courts to block unlawful federal overreach and enforce the law equally.**
Federal agents must be held to the same legal standards as everyone else. Arrests conducted without proper identification, the use of masks to conceal identity, detentions without stated cause, failure to explain the basis for arrest, reliance on improper or civil warrants, and unlawful entry are violations of state and federal law. No agency--and no badge--confers immunity from accountability.

These demands are not partisan. They are foundational.
We make them together because the alternative is normalization of repression. Because the next arrest may target another reporter, another publisher, another organizer, another candidate. Because the First Amendment only survives if it is defended when it is inconvenient.
History is clear about moments like this. Neutrality becomes complicity. Silence becomes consent.
The question before us is simple: Will we defend the Constitution when it is tested, or explain later why we did not?
**We choose to act.**
**Signed,**
_The undersigned journalists, creators, publishers, and citizens_

_Cliff Schecter, Founder & CEO_
_David Shuster, VP of Content_
_Lawrence Winnerman, COO_

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/is-the-ccp-losing-legitimacy?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e49e570-e480-4510-a078-ae9e9a04ccf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One of the most important global developments of the year got lost in the cacophony of January headlines. As the world focused on Greenland and its fate, the elites gathered in Davos to talk amongst and to themselves, Minneapolis residents took to the streets against ICE, and Wall Street began analyzing the implications of Kevin Warsh as the next Fed chair, major events in China that could have globe-shaking ramifications were under-reported.
Chinese President Xi Jingping [continued his purge of China's military](https://substack.com/redirect/1fbb5da7-89ab-4263-87d7-39982af3c4d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), this time targeting Zhang Youxia, the military's top general and Senior Vice Chair of the Central Military Commission, along with another member of the commission. The move leaves Xi atop the military hierarchy and completes one of the largest purges in Chinese military history. Aside from Xi, only one of the other commission's six members remains in place. The lone survivor is Zhang Shengmin; he was just elevated to vice chair last October, and he is widely regarded as more of a [political officer than a military commander](https://substack.com/redirect/a4741880-d82e-47d1-a008-63ef61f12e30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52c31568-7e11-4137-ae7a-3df73970a80a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Many diehard China-watchers (I admit to having been one since my undergraduate days when I spent a summer working at the US embassy in Beijing) noticed and began considering possible motivations and implications of the purge. Most reactions seem to focus on what the purge could mean for Taiwan's future relationship with China.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7eeda675-9918-42cb-a497-d4dea834c4d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
One camp argues that the purge was Xi's attempt to remove opposition to his directive for the military to be ready to invade Taiwan by 2027. According to this thinking, the professional military knows how challenging the invasion will be and are resistant. Replacing skeptical officers with a political officer at the top of the military ensures loyalty to Xi, and virtually guarantees obedience should he order an invasion. The implication of this thinking: expect Beijing to move imminently to "reintegrate" Taiwan.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Y_xKQdoYWVzqaRnKPP6Kb4AXjVoPEUdmAtPBubN6O7E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=186435265)
This is not the only perspective. Another camp argues the purges have weakened the military, and will seriously hinder its chances of success if it does invade Taiwan. A third splits the difference: some believe the purge means that China will not invade in the short-run, but in the long-run, when it finally does, it is more likely to be successful.
While all of these arguments have their merits, I want to offer a different take. I don't think this has anything to do with Taiwan at all. I think Xi is worried about things at home and the purge is an attempt to batten down the hatches for what is likely to be a forthcoming storm.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/362a64d7-36ae-406b-8a7c-966030e1190d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The truth of the matter is, [China is a mess](https://substack.com/redirect/07d80491-f1d7-43e5-b508-a1bc19646fbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The economy is characterized by overproduction, underconsumption, stagnating wages, and a deflationary spiral. Youth unemployment is uncomfortably high, leading to plunging confidence in the future. There are also [health and environmental](https://substack.com/redirect/4e77527c-aad2-42d0-bfb3-4e2d309edd44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) issues, and the one-child policy set-up a demographic time bomb where the country could [lose half of its population by the year 2100](https://substack.com/redirect/397f2dee-6f88-4ccf-8a43-946e9c0ea1d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). All of this has resulted in [internal divisions and dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/37cb6207-73a8-486c-9db9-852b8ac98386?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the conditions are ripe for social [unrest](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa3a026-f3d8-41e1-92fc-108c55c04a74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Could Xi be tightening his grip on the military because he is concerned about the potential for his ouster? I think so. I believe he wants to protect himself against a military coup as well as a popular uprising, making sure that the only institution that has the ability to oust him is left unable to do so. He wants to solidify his position and make sure that, if necessary, the PLA will use tanks to run over protesters to ensure stability and quell popular discontent.
* * *
## [Peace (and Prosperity) Through Strength](https://substack.com/redirect/53c00f22-7cb7-4c33-9ac7-cf896d0816fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| June 3, 2024
[](https://substack.com/redirect/53c00f22-7cb7-4c33-9ac7-cf896d0816fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Today marks the 35th anniversary of the Tiananmen Square massacre. A young student at the time, I remember being glued to the television as hopeful optimism quickly turned into a deadly crackdown. The events kicked off what has been a multi-decade professional interest in China, the repressive Chinese Communist Party, and the apparent certainty of a US-...](https://substack.com/redirect/53c00f22-7cb7-4c33-9ac7-cf896d0816fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/53c00f22-7cb7-4c33-9ac7-cf896d0816fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
And while putting a political officer at the head of the military is puzzling when viewed through the Taiwan lens (prioritizing loyalty over lethality), it makes perfect sense when considered in the context of internal dissent. Suppressing protests doesn't require officers; it requires obedience. As such, the purges may not be a sign of China's strength, but rather a warning sign of its weakness.
Of course, it's also worth considering the possibility that internal weakness leads to a scenario in which the CCP is more likely to military reintegrate Taiwan to bolster nationalism in a quest to quell protests. As I've learned from my travels around the world and from meetings with hundreds of elected officials, there's one thing that most politicians want - to stay politicians. Let's [not forget that less than 10% of the Chinese population](https://substack.com/redirect/8ee40be0-77bf-4dfb-8db6-e195d3cc8f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is affiliated with the Chinese Communist Party (CCP), meaning 90% or so of Chinese people are just interested in a better life for themselves and their families. Through this lens, the purges are all about Xi staying in power.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cc79610d-10ec-4fb6-bee5-faa045610cb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As I've often said, it's impossible to navigate uncertainty by relying on any one lens. The only hope of making sense of complex and rapidly emerging cross-currents is to triangulate different perspectives. And in this regard, looking at the military purges through a military lens is likely missing a key part of the story. Considering domestic dynamics is, I believe, critical to understanding what is going on.
While it's impossible to know what the future will hold for Taiwan, it's increasingly clear that domestic threats to the CCP are a rising concern. The military purge seems to be a reflection of those dynamics and, if so, is a clear sign that the legitimacy of the CCP is at risk. And while a dethroned CCP would likely make the world a better place, the short-term implications for the global economy would likely be quite negative.

Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/84eab629-f2ff-4479-80b2-d5f75312258d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/652ebd28-a4c5-43d3-820c-fd14eed82077?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/a02ee6df-dcfd-4716-8dc9-ffed05dfb861?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

I just wanted to drop you a quick note today to say _**thank you for your support.**_ Your support is what made all of these accomplishments possible in January: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124517993/598861142/-1302066992?refcode=ea.b8bd6385-98ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ms=ea.b8bd6385-98ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGJkNjM4NS05OGZmLWYwMTEtODMyZi0wMDBkM2ExZjBlNGMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pDeqHNq6XcxEdaNsGEW7fM9vJ8WltkE_GaoFolyN44g=&emci=69e42cdf-8cff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&emdi=b8bd6385-98ff-f011-832f-000d3a1f0e4c&ceid=51844520) When I look at everything we accomplished in just one month, I’m deeply proud of this grassroots team. Together, we’re showing all six million people of our state that yes, we _can_ build a strong, vibrant, people-powered movement with the energy and momentum to win in June (and beyond.) name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: Something big is happening in Texas.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
Huge news in Texas last night: Democrat Taylor Rehmet flipped a state Senate seat that Donald Trump won by 17 points — despite being outspent 10:1.
**Something big is happening in Texas.**
Republicans have held this seat for _decades_ — which is exactly why special interests poured tons of Big Money into this race.
Most pundits considered Taylor Rehmet’s campaign a dead end. But his win delivers a clear message: Texans are sick of the Trump administration’s tariffs, ICE raids, foreign wars, jailed journalists, and abuse of power.
Taylor won this seat because he built a broad coalition based on addition — not division. He built a tent big enough for anyone willing to join. **He fired up Democrats, and he did significant outreach to independents and disillusioned Trump voters to offer them a home in his movement to take back power for working people.**
The polling is clear that James is the best candidate to do this at the top of the ticket. He’s promised that not a single voter will be taken for granted. He can rally Democrats, inspire new voters who may have given up on this broken political system, and bring people over to our side.
That’s the approach we need if we want to win Texas. A movement of, by, and for the people.
But you have a critical role to play if we’re going to make that happen.
**[If you believe in our movement and want to take back Texas, please make a contribution to James Talarico today. Every dollar will help us win the primary in 30 days and take Texas back from billionaires and their puppet politicians.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260201-1-ak&t=1&akid=427%2E1347274%2EjNf8uR)**

James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=427%2E1347274%2EjNf8uR).
clean_body: Peter — Huge news in Texas last night: Democrat Taylor Rehmet flipped a state Senate seat that Donald Trump won by 17 points — despite being outspent 10:1. Something big is happening in Texas. Republicans have held this seat for decades — which is exactly why special interests poured tons of Big Money into this race. Most pundits considered Taylor Rehmet’s campaign a dead end. But his win delivers a clear message: Texans are sick of the Trump administration’s tariffs, ICE raids, foreign wars, jailed journalists, and abuse of power. Taylor won this seat because he built a broad coalition based on addition — not division. He built a tent big enough for anyone willing to join. He fired up Democrats, and he did significant outreach to independents and disillusioned Trump voters to offer them a home in his movement to take back power for working people. The polling is clear that James is the best candidate to do this at the top of the ticket. He’s promised that not a single voter will be taken for granted. He can rally Democrats, inspire new voters who may have given up on this broken political system, and bring people over to our side. That’s the approach we need if we want to win Texas. A movement of, by, and for the people. But you have a critical role to play if we’re going to make that happen. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** The momentum is on our side. Let’s keep it up. Team Talarico Paid for by Talarico for Texas Talarico for Texas PO Box 14508 Austin, TX 78761

name: Tim Walz
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
My work and this fight are far from over.
#
Hi Peter, it's Tim.
Now that January is finally over, I wanted to take a moment to reach out and express my deepest gratitude.
I won’t sugarcoat it: this past month was hell for our state. The federal government’s siege on Minnesota has taken a toll on our children, seniors, families, and local businesses — especially our immigrant community.
Countless individuals have had their rights violated, multiple lives have been lost, and numerous families have been torn apart. **But Minnesota still stands strong.**
One thing has remained the same: Minnesotans from all walks of life are meeting this violent chaos with peaceful resistance, and I couldn’t be prouder.
This vengeful president and his loyal, right-wing extremists may lob ugly attacks and file baseless charges against me, but know this:
**I won’t rest until we see impartial investigations, the departure of federal forces from Minnesota, and an end to this campaign of political retribution.**
So many of you have pitched in to our Legal Defense Fund these last few weeks, standing with me as I stand up for our state. I can’t thank you enough.
**But my work and this fight are far from over. We still have a ways to go to build the financial resources it will take to cover the mounting legal costs.**
**[If you can chip in $5 to the Fund, it will go a long way.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20260201.qGoHbL&amount=5&refcode=em20260201-450&t=1&akid=450%2E34582%2EqM4Crc)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20260201.qGoHbL&amount=5&refcode=20260201-450&t=20&akid=450%2E34582%2EqM4Crc)**
Thank you for everything, and I hope you’re keeping your head up during these trying times.
Sincerely,
Tim

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_ldf_footer?refcode=tw-em-20260201-450&t=21&refcode2=450_34582_qM4Crc&akid=450%2E34582%2EqM4Crc)**
---
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=22&akid=450%2E34582%2EqM4Crc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=450%2E34582%2EqM4Crc)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: It’s simple, but sadly, bleak…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
Failure to follow required verification procedures...
| **_FROM THE DESK OF RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
Dear Friend,
---
When I was arrested in Fulton County in the most violent jail in America, I could’ve made all the legal battles magically disappear overnight...
---
_...I could’ve betrayed the truth by going on camera, dropping to my knees, and saying that the 2020 election was perfectly fair, transparent, and completely free of fraud!_
---
In fact, some who were arrested __did__ take plea deals.
---
**But the President and I did NOT.**
---
Our position was clear: **__NEVER_ _SURRENDER_!_**
---
As the old saying goes, “I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”
---
_And now, the TRUTH is finally coming out:_
---
**“Fulton County admits to verifying 315,000 votes in 2020 without poll worker signatures”**
_-Atlanta News First_
---
But unfortunately, bloodthirsty left-wing tyrants do not care about the truth.
---
**I am _still_ being PROSECUTED by a vengeful Democrat Attorney General who wants to imprison me as part of her re-election campaign platform _this_ year.**
---
And with reports of a blue wave coming, she thinks she can get away with it – because voters will not stop her.
---
_Well, I beg to differ..._
---
_The people can stop her right here, right now by signing onto the People’s Defense of Rudy W. Giuliani in light of new evidence that adds even MORE doubt to the integrity of the 2020 election._
---

GIULIANI Dear Friend, When I was arrested in Fulton County in the most violent jail in America, I could’ve made all the legal battles magically disappear overnight... ...I could’ve betrayed the truth by going on camera, dropping to my knees, and saying that the 2020 election was perfectly fair, transparent, and completely free of fraud! In fact, some who were arrested did take plea deals. But the President and I did NOT. Our position was clear: NEVER SURRENDER! As the old saying goes, “I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.” And now, the TRUTH is finally coming out: “Fulton County admits to verifying 315,000 votes in 2020 without poll worker signatures” -Atlanta News First But unfortunately, bloodthirsty left-wing tyrants do not care about the truth. I am still being PROSECUTED by a vengeful Democrat Attorney General who wants to imprison me as part of her re-election campaign platform this year. And with reports of a blue wave coming, she thinks she can get away with it – because voters will not stop her. Well, I beg to differ... The people can stop her right here, right now by signing onto the People’s Defense of Rudy W. Giuliani in light of new evidence that adds even MORE doubt to the integrity of the 2020 election. - Thank you and God Bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Honoring the legacy of Black leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
I won’t let history be erased
| Hi, today’s the first day of Black History Month. Over the last year, we have seen Donald Trump and his allies try to erase the monumental accomplishments of Black Americans. Diversity is our nation’s strength — it always has been. The best of America has been people of all backgrounds coming together around one common purpose: building a better future. **No matter how much hatred or division is being spread, nothing can change that.** This Black History Month, I will be honoring the accomplishments of Black leaders who came before us and paved the way for a better future – a future where someone from a middle-class Milwaukee background like me could become the first Black lieutenant governor of Wisconsin. One of those leaders is Frances Huntley-Cooper, Wisconsin’s first Black mayor. She grew up in a segregated town and has dedicated her life to public service, helping disadvantaged communities aspire and achieve. I am humbled to have her endorsement in this race. **Because of the legacy of leaders like Frances Huntley-Cooper, I am dreaming a little higher to become our state’s youngest and first Black governor. And I will use every power of the office to raise wages, lower premiums, and fund public education so everyone can have the opportunity to thrive in our diverse democracy.** **[Today, I’m asking you if you can help us make history in this election. Please make a donation of any amount that is meaningful to you so we can deliver for Wisconsin and turn the page on a politics of division.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_020126_B1_BHM&t=2&akid=5807%2E196590%2EdlG6oT)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.ZvCZqZ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_020126_B1_BHM&t=3&akid=5807%2E196590%2EdlG6oT)

body:

name: Don Jr.
subject: Peter, I saved this message just for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support. My father and I know that this fight isn't possible without patriots like you who are willing to stand up for what's right.

We're honored to have you on our team, Peter.

**[As a small token of our appreciation, I'd like to share a special message with you. name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Thank you, thank you, thank you
body:
[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?t=1001&akid=3984%2E898137%2E42icVX ][IMG]

I just wanted to take a second to say thank you. We hit our January
fundraising goal, and that's because of you.

We're up against a Trump-endorsed opponent who's got no problem taking
money from whoever will give it to him, so the fact that we're building
this thing with actual people who give a damn? It means a lot.

I know these emails can feel endless. Trust me, I get it. But we've got
organizers to pay, ads to run, and a whole lot of work ahead of us if
we're going to win this thing.

We also have Michiganders to reach across the state, so instead of making
a donation today, please consider following our campaign on [ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/822?refcode=AU_MAM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20260201_PM1_V1_S1&t=1002&akid=3984%2E898137%2E42icVX ]X,
[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/823?refcode=AU_MAM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20260201_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=3984%2E898137%2E42icVX ]Instagram, [ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/824?refcode=AU_MAM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20260201_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=3984%2E898137%2E42icVX ]Threads, [ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/825?refcode=AU_MAM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20260201_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=3984%2E898137%2E42icVX ]Facebook, and [ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/826?refcode=AU_MAM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20260201_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=3984%2E898137%2E42icVX ]BlueSky if you haven’t
already. Every day, my team and I share updates about my plans and
policies, the state of the race, and how we can build a New American Dream
together.

Your support is what makes all of that possible, so thank you.

Mallory

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-feb2026.sAPBa3&refcode=AU_MAM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20260201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=3984%2E898137%2E42icVX ]DONATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3984%2E898137%2E42icVX

name: Chris Pappas
subject: We couldn’t have done this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
With your help we reached our goal — and now we’re ready for the finish line.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4902%2E582294%2EzA1PAz)
I wanted to reach out personally to say thank you.
**Because of this incredible grassroots team, we met our end-of-month fundraising goal — and that momentum matters.** Your support gives us the power we need to push back against attacks from national Republicans and keep fighting to defend New Hampshire’s Senate seat.
I’m deeply grateful for everyone who believes in this campaign and is willing to invest in the work ahead. Every contribution and ounce of trust you’ve placed in this campaign makes all the difference.
As we head into February, the stakes will only get higher. My opponents and the NRSC aren’t showing any signs of slowing down — **_and neither are we._**
**[If you’re ready to help us kick off February strong, can you chip in $5 today to keep building on this grassroots-powered momentum?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260201_1.-cRMYL&refcode=em20260201-1&t=2&akid=4902%2E582294%2EzA1PAz)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260201_1.-cRMYL&amount=5&refcode=em20260201-1&t=21&akid=4902%2E582294%2EzA1PAz)**
Thank you for being a part of this fight,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260201-1&t=22&refcode2=4902_582294_zA1PAz&akid=4902%2E582294%2EzA1PAz)**

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: I won’t just sit back and let us lose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The work we are doing in the Senate is too important to stop - but our majority is in grave peril. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8e6a11939a2f4844b357118e5a0f254b&_e=F4zaypD8HqwU2N47jty2ns8M4XK0WKEGn5jm9XEIdPNyfztcgdGolgH3YEXStKAYLGsphshPJMPc41vDpfg1ZCvqcgLDdJV_mcuJm7rW4KGVy0xBe7QbA6QU5KBJ7KoaVNRIB2fRUgT5swb4dizTr7KUhEYNRXygV-LtzTYJB8rLjx4_LoMbH9EzQKX-I0Ea-OCiqSUJRMm0TKx1N7pRVfGCDXwMsFNT70AMBmRLKpEphuPefZR8thLrwhU5ZoW3-OfsgqygRRMqjRp1U9pCAC33MrBwqztGjdVQhTQ4ErZUEaXK2Hf1fW3vgnEasAj1mFG5jizGOWH7lAn3Ffwtj4Qd5szHk9AqqmSvV8GA_6Jp1JMn5I8_onLCdVoNssY49-vyZgSJ7U-ZkYW8ICO8GKkp4nF-15qUydYYmR8NQEiBRkpGy1Wm9APHKljG2bewCs7jvLQ2LJ_xWxSDJEqbbqTPylyYwnVCgtv5elo6Yb_g6eX1tN38qrdKfFPbCgD74CkbQZmKItT_a459c4ArFaxFqsXJvDaOgeB0EaQYXrgdGIdlEBy7yTMPYuTjuSZfCFyddIiLhSMJ3Ie6QCdcJx-maFYgC8iH2B6G0QozD3O03_nlLRb3W6s-l0nlWmnzCpIDdNIe_SYaYhj5Jmbc6kNDYGguwk_a2RZR3Iluhku9Nv-gsnr6BdfcuRTcJm-5t9ZOdxnuNeWeCtC0C8X1jUOeydA5tvv9oKzeaa8RjrIfF0WqLgpoB2W6sqiBSEIu)

---

Fellow Conservative,

I’m not writing you today to alarm you, _**but rather to help you understand how precarious our current situation is.**_

During the 2024 campaign, your hard-earned dollars propelled us to victory, capturing not only the House, but the Senate and the White House. And I believe that the last twelve months have been among the most productive in Washington in DECADES.

But if polls are to be believed, then that productivity, our majority, and perhaps even the future of our Republic as we know it today are in danger.

There is no way to put this other than to deliver the bad news outright: **Democrats have extended their lead over Republicans by 14 points on the generic ballot.**

_**If you’ll recall, I only won my seat in Montana by a little more than 7.5%, and in Texas, my friend Sen. Ted Cruz won his race by just over 9%.**_

Hate is a powerful motivator, and Democrats abhor President Trump and all those who stand alongside him.

**_But there is still time._**

**[I’m asking you for a donation of $25, $50, $75, or even $100 right now that we’ll use to help elect Republicans in some of the most fiercely contested races this year.
